title: A comparative study of transformer models and recurrent neural networks for path-dependent composite materials
summary: Accurate modeling of Short Fiber Reinforced Composites (SFRCs) remains computationally expensive for full-field simulations. Data-driven surrogate models using Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) have been proposed as an efficient alternative to numerical modeling, where Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) are increasingly being used for path-dependent multiscale modeling by predicting the homogenized response of a Representative Volume Element (RVE). However, recently, transformer models have been developed and they offer scalability and efficient parallelization, yet have not been systematically compared with RNNs in this field. In this study, we perform a systematic comparison between RNNs and transformer models trained on sequences of homogenized response of SFRC RVEs. We study the effect on two types of hyperparameters, namely architectural hyperparameters (such as the number of GRU layers, hidden size, number of attention heads, and encoder blocks) and training hyperparameters (such as learning rate and batch size). Both sets of hyperparameters are tuned using Bayesian optimization. We then analyze scaling laws with respect to dataset size and inference accuracy in interpolation and extrapolation regimes. The results show that while transformer models remain competitive in terms of accuracy on large datasets, the RNNs demonstrate better accuracy on small datasets and show better extrapolation performance. Furthermore, under extrapolation, there is a clear difference, where the RNN remains accurate, while the transformer model performs poorly. On the other hand, the transformer model is 7 times faster at inference, requiring 0.5 ms per prediction compared to the 3.5 ms per prediction for the RNN model.

AI.tldr: 系统比较了RNN和Transformer在短纤维增强复合材料多尺度建模中的性能，发现RNN在小数据集和外推方面表现更好，而Transformer在推理速度上快7倍。
AI.motivation: 短纤维增强复合材料的全场模拟计算成本高昂，数据驱动的代理模型成为高效替代方案。虽然RNN已用于路径相关的多尺度建模，Transformer提供了可扩展性和高效并行化，但两者在该领域尚未进行系统比较。
AI.method: 对RNN和Transformer模型进行系统比较，使用贝叶斯优化调整架构超参数（GRU层数、隐藏大小、注意力头数、编码器块数）和训练超参数（学习率、批量大小），分析数据集规模和推理精度在插值和外推区域的比例关系。
AI.result: Transformer在大数据集上精度具有竞争力，但RNN在小数据集上精度更高且外推性能更好；在外推情况下，RNN保持准确而Transformer表现较差；Transformer推理速度快7倍（0.5ms vs 3.5ms）。
AI.conclusion: RNN在小数据集和外推场景中表现更优，而Transformer在推理速度上有显著优势，为不同应用场景提供了选择依据。

title: Adaptive Uncertainty-Guided Surrogates for Efficient phase field Modeling of Dendritic Solidification
comment: This manuscript is a preprint and has not yet been peer-reviewed. It has 45 pages and 14 figures
summary: The high computational cost of phase field simulations remains a major limitation for predicting dendritic solidification in metals, particularly in additive manufacturing, where microstructural control is critical. This work presents a surrogate model for dendritic solidification that employs uncertainty-driven adaptive sampling with XGBoost and CNNs, including a self-supervised strategy, to efficiently approximate the spatio-temporal evolution while reducing costly phase field simulations. The proposed adaptive strategy leverages model uncertainty, approximated via Monte Carlo dropout for CNNs and bagging for XGBoost, to identify high-uncertainty regions where new samples are generated locally within hyperspheres, progressively refining the spatio-temporal design space and achieving accurate predictions with significantly fewer phase field simulations than an Optimal Latin Hypercube Sampling optimized via discrete Particle Swarm Optimization (OLHS-PSO). The framework systematically investigates how temporal instance selection, adaptive sampling, and the choice between domain-informed and data-driven surrogates affect spatio-temporal model performance. Evaluation considers not only computational cost but also the number of expensive phase field simulations, surrogate accuracy, and associated $CO_2$ emissions, providing a comprehensive assessment of model performance as well as their related environmental impact.

AI.tldr: 提出基于XGBoost和CNN的替代模型，通过不确定性驱动的自适应采样减少相场模拟计算成本，用于预测金属枝晶凝固过程
AI.motivation: 相场模拟计算成本过高限制了金属枝晶凝固预测，特别是在需要微观结构控制的增材制造领域
AI.method: 使用XGBoost和CNN构建替代模型，采用不确定性驱动的自适应采样策略（CNN用Monte Carlo dropout，XGBoost用bagging估计不确定性），在高不确定性区域局部生成新样本，逐步优化时空设计空间
AI.result: 相比OLHS-PSO优化方法，显著减少了相场模拟次数，实现了准确预测，并评估了计算成本、准确性和CO₂排放
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高效预测枝晶凝固提供了有效解决方案，同时考虑了时间实例选择、自适应采样和模型类型对性能的影响，以及环境影响的综合评估

title: NEP-CG and NEP-AACG: Efficient coarse-grained and multiscale all-atom-coarse-grained neuroevolution potentials
summary: Machine-learned coarse-grained (CG) models often suffer from noisy training data, limiting their accuracy and transferability. We propose a method to generate low-noise training data based on the potential of mean force by constraining CG beads during atomistic simulations and accumulating time-averaged forces. Implemented within the neuroevolution potential (NEP) framework, our approach achieves training accuracy comparable to atomistic models trained on density functional theory data. For liquid water, the NEP-CG model accurately reproduces densities from 1 bar to 1 GPa, successfully extrapolating beyond the 0.5 GPa training limit, with a virial correction essential for the correct equation of state. For an anisotropic C$_{60}$ monolayer, distinguishing crystallographically distinct bead types reduces stress errors by an order of magnitude and captures directional thermal conductivity. We further introduce a multiscale NEP-AACG model integrating all-atom (AA) and CG degrees of freedom, demonstrated for gold nanowire fracture at an experimentally relevant strain rate. Computational speeds for NEP-CG models reach hundreds to thousands of ns/day using a single consumer-grade GPU. This work provides a robust framework for constructing accurate, transferable, and efficient CG models across diverse systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于平均力势生成低噪声训练数据的方法，通过约束粗粒化珠子在原子模拟中并累积时间平均力，在神经进化势框架中实现，构建准确、可迁移且高效的粗粒化模型。
AI.motivation: 机器学习粗粒化模型常受噪声训练数据限制，影响准确性和可迁移性，需要开发能生成低噪声训练数据的方法。
AI.method: 通过约束粗粒化珠子在原子模拟中并累积时间平均力来生成低噪声训练数据，基于平均力势，在神经进化势框架中实现，并引入多尺度模型整合全原子和粗粒化自由度。
AI.result: 液态水模型准确复现1 bar到1 GPa密度，成功外推超过0.5 GPa训练极限；各向异性C60单层模型将应力误差降低一个数量级并捕捉方向热导率；金纳米线断裂多尺度模型展示实验相关应变率；计算速度达数百至数千ns/天（单消费级GPU）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建准确、可迁移且高效的粗粒化模型提供了稳健框架，适用于多种系统，计算效率高，能有效外推超出训练范围。

title: Update of PHYSBO: Improving Usability and Portability of Bayesian Optimization for Physics and Materials Research
summary:
Bayesian optimization (BO) is widely used to accelerate physics and materials research, where objective function evaluations are computationally or experimentally expensive. While many BO frameworks focus on algorithmic efficiency, practical usability and portability are equally critical for sustained use in real research environments. PHYSBO is a Bayesian optimization library designed to address these needs by enabling optimization over user-defined candidate pools and by supporting domain-specific problem settings.
  This paper presents the major updates introduced in PHYSBO versions 2 and 3, with a focus on improvements in usability, portability, and practical deployment rather than on new optimization algorithms. In PHYSBO version 2, the software license was changed from GPL to MPL to improve compatibility with a wider range of research and software ecosystems. Building on this revision, PHYSBO version 3 introduces a set of implementation-oriented updates aimed at improving usability and portability, without modifying the core optimization algorithms. These updates include improvements in computational performance and scalability, extended support for multi-objective optimization, the introduction of range-based policies for continuous-variable optimization, the removal of environment-dependent components such as tightly coupled Cython modules, and compatibility with NumPy 2.
  These improvements reduce the technical and organizational burden on users, enabling PHYSBO to be deployed across diverse computing environments and research workflows. By emphasizing portability and ease of integration while maintaining sufficient performance, PHYSBO version 3 is positioned as a sustainable research infrastructure for Bayesian optimization in physics and materials science.

AI.tldr: PHYSBO是一个贝叶斯优化库，专为物理和材料研究设计，最新版本（v2和v3）主要改进可用性、可移植性和实际部署，而非新算法。
AI.motivation: 虽然许多贝叶斯优化框架关注算法效率，但在实际研究环境中，实用性和可移植性同样重要。PHYSBO旨在解决这些需求，使其能在真实研究环境中持续使用。
AI.method: PHYSBO v2将许可证从GPL改为MPL以提高兼容性；v3引入实现导向的更新：改进计算性能和可扩展性、扩展多目标优化支持、引入连续变量优化的基于范围的策略、移除环境依赖组件（如紧密耦合的Cython模块）、兼容NumPy 2。
AI.result: 这些改进减少了用户的技术和组织负担，使PHYSBO能够在不同的计算环境和研究工作流程中部署。通过强调可移植性和易集成性，同时保持足够性能，PHYSBO v3成为物理和材料科学中贝叶斯优化的可持续研究基础设施。
AI.conclusion: PHYSBO版本2和3的主要更新集中在提高可用性、可移植性和实际部署能力，使其更适合在多样化的研究环境中作为可持续的贝叶斯优化基础设施使用。

title: Laser-induced, blackbody-radiation-assisted rovibrational cooling of symmetric-top molecular ions: NH3+ and ND3+
summary: Quantum-state preparation of molecular ions is a prerequisite for precision spectroscopy and controlled studies of cold ion-molecule dynamics. While such control has been extensively developed for diatomic ions and proposed for linear polyatomic ions, corresponding strategies for symmetric-top molecular ions remain largely unexplored. We present a theoretical investigation of blackbody-radiation (BBR)-assisted rovibrational dynamics and laser cooling in the symmetric-top ions NH3+ and ND3+, prepared in specific ro-vibrational states by resonance enhanced multiphoton ionization (REMPI) of the neutral precursor. State-resolved radiative lifetimes and equilibration times are computed, revealing that vibrationally excited states decay rapidly, while the ground-state redistribution is dominated by slow BBR-driven ro-vibrational transitions as pure rotational transitions are forbidden in the non-polar NH3+ and ND3+ ions. BBR-assisted laser pumping via the nu2 umbrella-bending mode efficiently cools rotational levels within fixed K manifolds; however, Delta K = 0 selection rules induce a bottleneck, limiting access to the absolute rovibrational ground state for some initially prepared states. Isotopic substitution to ND3+ further slows dynamics due to reduced transition dipoles. At room temperature, these cooling schemes yield more than 90% and 85% of the population in selected rovibrational states of the NH3+ and ND3+ ions, respectively. In contrast, at temperatures below 100 K, BBR-induced redistribution is strongly suppressed for ions initially produced in the rovibrational ground state (v=0, J, K), effectively freezing the population for extended storage times. In comparison, vibrationally excited states exhibit lifetimes on the order of a few milliseconds, independent of the temperature of the BBR field.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了对称顶分子离子NH3+和ND3+的黑体辐射辅助转动振动动力学和激光冷却，通过REMPI制备特定状态，分析了辐射寿命和平衡时间，发现振动激发态快速衰减而基态重分布缓慢，激光冷却在固定K能级内有效但存在ΔK=0瓶颈，同位素替代进一步减慢动力学。
AI.motivation: 分子离子的量子态制备是精密光谱学和冷离子-分子动力学研究的前提。虽然双原子离子的控制已广泛发展，线性多原子离子也有相关策略，但对称顶分子离子的相应控制策略仍基本未探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过共振增强多光子电离(REMPI)中性前体制备特定转动振动态的NH3+和ND3+离子。理论研究了黑体辐射辅助的转动振动动力学和激光冷却，计算了态分辨辐射寿命和平衡时间，分析了nu2伞形弯曲模式的激光泵浦冷却效率。
AI.result: 振动激发态快速衰减（毫秒量级），而基态重分布由缓慢的黑体辐射驱动转动振动跃迁主导。激光冷却在固定K能级内有效，但ΔK=0选择规则造成瓶颈，限制达到绝对转动振动基态。ND3+因跃迁偶极矩减小而动力学更慢。室温下冷却方案使超过90%（NH3+）和85%（ND3+）的布居进入选定转动振动态。低于100K时，黑体辐射诱导重分布被强烈抑制，基态布居可长时间冻结。
AI.conclusion: 对称顶分子离子NH3+和ND3+的黑体辐射辅助激光冷却方案有效，但存在ΔK=0瓶颈限制达到绝对基态。低温下基态布居可长时间冻结，而振动激发态寿命与黑体辐射场温度无关。该研究为对称顶分子离子的量子态控制和精密光谱学提供了理论基础。

title: Emergence of Charge-Imbalanced BCS State and Suppression of Nonequilibrium FFLO State in Asymmetric NSN Junctions
summary: We theoretically study nonequilibrium superconductivity in voltage-biased normal metal-superconductor-normal metal (NSN) junctions, focusing on effects of lead-coupling asymmetry and impurity scattering. Using the Keldysh Green's function technique, we extend the thermal-equilibrium mean-field BCS theory to the case where the system is out of equilibrium, to analyze superconducting properties in the nonequilibrium steady state. We find that, in close analogy with the thermal-equilibrium case, the inhomogeneous nonequilibrium Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov (NFFLO) state induced by nonequilibrium electron distributions is highly sensitive to impurity scattering, whereas the uniform nonequilibrium BCS (NBCS) state remains robust against nonmagnetic impurities. Moreover, lead-coupling asymmetry is also found to suppress the NFFLO phase and to split the NBCS phase into two distinct regimes, characterized by the presence or absence of a chemical-potential imbalance between quasiparticles and the condensate. We identify a phase transition or a crossover between these two NBCS states, as well as parameter regimes exhibiting bistability. Our results provide a unified microscopic understanding of nonequilibrium superconductivity in NSN junctions under experimentally relevant conditions and are expected to provide a theoretical framework applicable to a broad class of nonequilibrium superconducting hybrid structures.

AI.tldr: 该论文理论研究了电压偏置的正常金属-超导体-正常金属结中的非平衡超导性，重点关注引线耦合不对称性和杂质散射的影响，发现非平衡FFLO态对杂质敏感而BCS态稳定，耦合不对称会抑制FFLO态并导致BCS态分裂为两个不同区域。
AI.motivation: 研究非平衡条件下超导体的性质，特别是在电压偏置的NSN结中，考虑实验相关的条件如引线耦合不对称性和杂质散射，为理解非平衡超导性提供统一的微观理论框架。
AI.method: 使用Keldysh格林函数技术，将热平衡平均场BCS理论扩展到非平衡情况，分析非平衡稳态下的超导性质，研究引线耦合不对称性和杂质散射对非平衡超导态的影响。
AI.result: 发现非平衡FFLO态对杂质散射高度敏感，而非平衡BCS态对非磁性杂质保持鲁棒；引线耦合不对称性会抑制NFFLO相，并将NBCS相分裂为两个不同区域，这两个区域以准粒子和凝聚体之间是否存在化学势不平衡为特征；识别了这两个NBCS态之间的相变或交叉，以及表现出双稳态的参数区域。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为NSN结中非平衡超导性提供了统一的微观理解，并建立了一个适用于广泛非平衡超导混合结构的理论框架，有助于理解实验相关条件下的非平衡超导现象。

title: Rate-Dependent Internal Energy from Detailed-Balance Relaxation
comment: 4 pages for main body, 9 pages for supplementary material
summary: Thermalization in driven open quantum systems is often described as ordinary thermodynamics supplemented by additional dissipation that depends on how the system is driven. We show that when relaxation is treated consistently at the generator level within Gaussian GKLS dynamics, thermodynamics itself acquires an intrinsically dynamical state space. For a frequency-modulated harmonic oscillator coupled to a thermal bath, detailed balance selects a relaxing quadratic frame characterized by an emergent frequency $ω_I(t)$. This coordinate obeys an Onsager-type relaxation equation with a positive kinetic coefficient set by the bath coupling. As a consequence, the first law acquires an additional generalized work term, and eliminating auxiliary variables yields an internal energy of the form $E=E(ω_{I},\dotω_{I})$, or equivalently $E=E(S,\dot S)$ during thermalization. The rate dependence originates from detailed-balance relaxation rather than external driving protocols. Our results predict a measurable energy shift proportional to $\dotω_{I}/α$, providing a direct signature that thermalization enlarges thermodynamic state space.

AI.tldr: 热化驱动的开放量子系统中，当采用高斯GKLS动力学一致处理弛豫时，热力学本身获得了一个内在的动态状态空间，导致第一定律出现额外的广义功项。
AI.motivation: 传统上，驱动开放量子系统的热化被描述为普通热力学加上依赖于驱动方式的额外耗散。本文旨在探索当在生成元级别一致处理弛豫时，热力学本身如何获得动态状态空间。
AI.method: 采用高斯GKLS动力学框架，研究频率调制的谐振子与热浴耦合系统。通过细致平衡条件选择弛豫的二次框架，其特征是涌现频率ω_I(t)。
AI.result: 涌现频率ω_I(t)服从Onsager型弛豫方程，具有由浴耦合设定的正动力学系数。这导致第一定律获得额外的广义功项，内能形式变为E=E(ω_I,˙ω_I)或E=E(S,˙S)。预测了与˙ω_I/α成正比的能量偏移。
AI.conclusion: 热化过程本身扩展了热力学状态空间，这种速率依赖性源于细致平衡弛豫而非外部驱动协议，为热化扩大热力学状态空间提供了直接证据。

title: Quantum geometry-driven photogalvanic responses in semi-Dirac systems
summary: The photogalvanic effect (PGE), a fundamental nonlinear optical phenomenon in non-centrosymmetric materials, generates direct photocurrent under polarized light. Using quantum kinetic theory within the relaxation-time approximation, we theoretically investigate the PGE as a probe of quantum geometry in anisotropic type-I and type-II semi-Dirac (SD) systems, characterized by distinct electronic structures. We systematically analyse various microscopic contributions to the PGE conductivity, including injection, shift, resonance, higher-order pole, and anomalous terms, and emphasize their connections to different quantum geometric quantities, namely, Berry curvature, quantum metric, and metric connection. By studying the frequency and chemical-potential dependence of the PGE conductivity in SD systems, we find that the optical conductivities in the type-II case are significantly enhanced relative to those in type-I. For the circular PGE (CPGE), Berry-curvature-driven contributions remain qualitatively similar in both phases, whereas the linear PGE (LPGE) displays clear qualitative differences. In particular, the $xxx$ component of the shift conductivity in the type-II phase reverses sign upon tuning the perturbation parameter $δ$, providing a direct signature of the Lifshitz transition. In contrast, other components remain sign-invariant, as in type-I SD systems. These combined CPGE and LPGE signatures provide an unambiguous distinction between the two SD phases. The predicted effects, realizable in TiO$_2$/VO$_2$ heterostructures, establish PGE as a sensitive probe of quantum geometry with potential applications in polarization-selective photodetection, optical rectification, and next-generation optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用量子动力学理论，系统分析了各向异性半狄拉克系统中的光生伏打效应，揭示了其作为量子几何探针的潜力，并发现I型和II型半狄拉克系统在光电流响应上存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 研究光生伏打效应作为探测非中心对称材料中量子几何特性的工具，特别是在具有不同电子结构的各向异性半狄拉克系统中，探索量子几何量（贝里曲率、量子度规、度规联络）与光电流产生机制之间的联系。
AI.method: 采用弛豫时间近似下的量子动力学理论，系统分析光生伏打电导率的各种微观贡献：注入项、位移项、共振项、高阶极点项和反常项，并研究这些贡献与量子几何量的关联。
AI.result: 发现II型半狄拉克系统的光导率显著高于I型；圆偏振光生伏打效应中贝里曲率驱动的贡献在两种相中定性相似，而线偏振光生伏打效应显示出明显差异；特别地，II型相中位移电导率的xxx分量随扰动参数δ变化会改变符号，这为Lifshitz转变提供了直接特征。
AI.conclusion: 光生伏打效应可作为量子几何的灵敏探针，结合圆偏振和线偏振光生伏打效应的特征可明确区分两种半狄拉克相，这些效应在TiO2/VO2异质结构中可实现，在偏振选择性光电探测、光学整流和下一代光电器件中具有应用潜力。

title: Interfacial properties of MoS2 thin films grown on functional substrates
summary: Interface chemistry and defect formation in MoS2 thin films grown on single crystal substrates critically determine the electronic structure of MoS2 and thus can strongly modify material functionality relevant for many applications, including electronics, optoelectronics, and energy related catalysis. We investigate MoS2 grown on three technologically relevant substrates, namely SrTiO3(111), c-axis Al2O3(0001) and 6H-SiC(0001). Experimental investigations by temperature dependent resistivity, photoemission spectroscopy and scanning transmission electron microscopy with coupled energy dispersive spectroscopy, with the support of theoretical calculation by Density Functional Theory, allow the identification of the substrate induced specific defects and their correlation with the electronic properties. Ti interdiffusion in SrTiO3/MoS2 generates donor like states near the Fermi level, leading to metallic transport. Al2O3/MoS2 exhibits a high density of sulfur related defects that introduce localized states and yield nearly temperature independent conductivity. SiC/MoS2 exhibits significant interface disorder resulting in a semiconducting temperature dependent resistivity, yet deviating from the ideal bulk like behavior. These results demonstrate how substrate choice governs defect formation and ultimately dominates the electronic behavior of MoS2 thin films, making the control of film substrate interactions essential for the engineering of new functional devices.

AI.tldr: 不同衬底（SrTiO₃、Al₂O₃、SiC）上生长的MoS₂薄膜会形成特定界面缺陷，这些缺陷显著改变MoS₂的电子结构和电输运性质，衬底选择对器件功能工程至关重要。
AI.motivation: 研究MoS₂薄膜在不同单晶衬底上的界面化学和缺陷形成，因为这些因素会显著改变MoS₂的电子结构，影响其在电子学、光电子学和能源催化等应用中的功能。
AI.method: 采用实验与理论相结合的方法：通过变温电阻率测量、光电子能谱、扫描透射电子显微镜结合能量色散谱进行实验研究，并辅以密度泛函理论计算支持。
AI.result: 不同衬底诱导特定缺陷：SrTiO₃/MoS₂中Ti互扩散产生费米能级附近的施主态，导致金属性输运；Al₂O₃/MoS₂存在高密度硫相关缺陷，产生局域态和几乎与温度无关的电导率；SiC/MoS₂界面无序显著，表现出半导体温度依赖但偏离理想体材料行为。
AI.conclusion: 衬底选择主导MoS₂薄膜的缺陷形成和电子行为，控制薄膜-衬底相互作用对于新型功能器件工程至关重要。

title: Conductivity scaling of the anomalous Hall effect in the altermagnetic semiconductor α-MnTe
summary: α-MnTe is a prototypical altermagnet exhibiting a strong anomalous Hall effect (AHE), despite having a nearly vanishing magnetization. Lately, sample-to-sample variations of the amplitude of the AHE have raised concerns of a possible defect related origin, especially in thin films. Here, we study the AHE in α-MnTe films grown on SrF2 that have the crystal structure and m'm'm magnetic point group symmetry expected for bulk. By studying the scaling of the AHE with conductivity for those films and previously reported measurements in the literature, we find that sample-to-sample variations are well explained by a scaling law consistent with a hopping origin. Importantly, a comparison with other magnetic semiconductors reveals the colossal amplitude of the AHE of α-MnTe compared to its measured spontaneous magnetization from magnetometry and polarized neutron reflectivity. Our findings address the important fundamental question of the origin of the AHE of α-MnTe and further demonstrate the potential of altermagnets as promising spintronic materials.

AI.tldr: α-MnTe薄膜中巨大的反常霍尔效应源于跳跃机制，而非缺陷，其强度远超磁化强度，证实了反铁磁体在自旋电子学中的潜力。
AI.motivation: α-MnTe作为典型的反铁磁体表现出巨大的反常霍尔效应，但样品间的效应强度差异引发了关于其是否源于缺陷的担忧，特别是在薄膜中。需要澄清AHE的起源并确认反铁磁体作为自旋电子材料的潜力。
AI.method: 在SrF2衬底上生长具有体材料晶体结构和m'm'm磁点群对称性的α-MnTe薄膜，研究AHE与电导率的标度关系，并与文献中其他磁性半导体的测量结果进行比较。
AI.result: 样品间的AHE强度差异可以通过与跳跃机制一致的标度定律解释；α-MnTe的AHE幅度相比其磁化强度（来自磁强计和极化中子反射率测量）极其巨大，证实了其内在起源。
AI.conclusion: α-MnTe的巨大反常霍尔效应源于内在的跳跃机制而非缺陷，这解决了关于其起源的基本问题，并进一步证明了反铁磁体作为有前景的自旋电子材料的潜力。

title: On the Intrinsic Link between Gradient Strengthening and Passivation Onset in Single Crystal Plasticity
summary: A finite-deformation framework for gradient crystal plasticity is developed within a thermodynamically consistent setting grounded in Gurtin's power-conjugate formulation. The model introduces a flow rule that accounts explicitly for both energetic and dissipative microstress contributions. Numerical simulations are performed to investigate the response of single crystals subjected to passivation-type boundary constraints. The results reveal that constitutive laws capable of reproducing size-dependent strengthening at the onset of plastic flow simultaneously generate a pronounced, nearly elastic-type response when passivation is imposed. These findings establish a fundamental connection between gradient-induced yield strengthening and boundary-driven elevation of the mechanical response, highlighting the essential influence of dissipative gradient effects.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于Gurtin功率共轭公式的热力学一致有限变形梯度晶体塑性框架，该模型引入显式考虑能量和耗散微应力贡献的流动规则，揭示了梯度诱导屈服强化与边界驱动机械响应提升之间的基本联系。
AI.motivation: 建立热力学一致的有限变形梯度晶体塑性理论框架，研究微应力贡献对晶体塑性行为的影响，特别是边界约束条件下的尺寸效应和强化机制。
AI.method: 基于Gurtin的功率共轭公式，在热力学一致框架下开发有限变形梯度晶体塑性模型，引入显式考虑能量和耗散微应力贡献的流动规则，并进行数值模拟研究单晶在钝化型边界约束下的响应。
AI.result: 数值模拟结果表明：能够再现塑性流动起始时尺寸依赖性强化的本构定律，在施加钝化约束时会产生显著的近弹性型响应，揭示了梯度诱导屈服强化与边界驱动机械响应提升之间的基本联系。
AI.conclusion: 建立了梯度诱导屈服强化与边界驱动机械响应提升之间的基本联系，强调了耗散梯度效应的重要影响，为理解晶体塑性中的尺寸效应和边界约束效应提供了理论框架。

title: Designing the Haystack: Programmable Chemical Space for Generative Molecular Discovery
summary: Chemical space exploration underlies drug discovery, yet most generative models treat chemical space as a fixed, implicitly learned distribution, focusing on sampling molecules rather than deliberately designing the space itself. We introduce SpaceGFN, a generative framework that elevates chemical space to a programmable computational object: a controllable degree of freedom enabling explicit construction and adaptive traversal of structured molecular universes. SpaceGFN decouples space definition from exploration. Users specify building blocks and reaction rules to construct chemically and synthetically coherent spaces, while a GFlowNet performs efficient, property-biased sampling within them. In Discovery mode, we demonstrate programmable space design through two strategies. A pseudo-natural product space assembles natural product-like architectures. An evolution-inspired (Evo) space recombines endogenous metabolite fragments via enzyme-consistent transformations, introducing an evolutionary prior into chemical generation. This bias yields favorable shifts in predicted metabolic and toxicological profiles while preserving pharmacological diversity, supported by broad docking enrichment across therapeutic targets. In Editing mode, SpaceGFN enables reaction-consistent lead optimization through a curated toolkit of executable synthetic transformations, allowing local, synthesis-aware modification of existing compounds instead of unrestricted graph mutation. Across 96 drug targets, SpaceGFN achieves strong optimization performance while maintaining structural diversity under synthetic constraints. By integrating programmable chemical universe construction with flow-based exploration and reaction-level editing, SpaceGFN establishes a general paradigm for deliberate navigation of therapeutic chemical space.

AI.tldr: SpaceGFN是一个将化学空间作为可编程计算对象的生成框架，通过解耦空间定义与探索，实现结构化分子宇宙的构建与自适应遍历。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数生成模型将化学空间视为固定的隐式学习分布，专注于采样分子而非有意识地设计空间本身。需要一种能够将化学空间提升为可编程计算对象的方法，实现结构化分子宇宙的显式构建和自适应遍历。
AI.method: SpaceGFN采用生成流网络(GFlowNet)框架，解耦空间定义与探索：用户指定构建模块和反应规则来构建化学和合成一致的空间，GFlowNet在空间内执行高效、属性偏置的采样。提供两种模式：Discovery模式（伪天然产物空间和进化启发空间）和Editing模式（反应一致的先导化合物优化）。
AI.result: 在Discovery模式中，进化启发空间通过酶一致转化重组内源性代谢物片段，引入进化先验，改善了预测的代谢和毒理学特征，同时保持了药理学多样性，在多个治疗靶点上实现了广泛的对接富集。在Editing模式中，SpaceGFN在96个药物靶点上实现了强大的优化性能，同时在合成约束下保持了结构多样性。
AI.conclusion: SpaceGFN通过整合可编程化学宇宙构建、基于流的探索和反应级编辑，建立了一个用于有意识导航治疗化学空间的通用范式，为药物发现提供了新的框架。

title: Pressure-tuned double-dome superconductivity in KZnBi with honeycomb lattice
summary: Materials with honeycomb lattice structures exhibit unique electronic properties arising from their distinctive atomic arrangements. Their weakly coupled nature facilitates modulation by external stimuli, which leads to a diverse range of physical phenomena, particularly superconductivity. Here, we report the discovery of a pressure-induced M-shaped double-dome superconducting phase in KZnBi with honeycomb lattice. Under applied pressure, the superconducting transition temperature Tc increases sharply and reaches a maximum value of 7 K at approximately 2.5 GPa. Following a structural phase transition from the ambient-pressure P63/mmc phase to the high-pressure Pnma phase, Tc gradually decreases. Further compression induces an electronic transition near 7 GPa, accompanied by an unexpected reentrant superconducting phase with a higher Tc of 8 K. Our theoretical calculations indicate that KZnBi undergoes a transition from a Dirac band structure to a strong topological semimetal state following the structural phase transition. These findings establish KZnBi as an ideal platform for investigating the diverse structural manifestations and intrinsic phenomena of the honeycomb lattice, demonstrating the fundamental importance of honeycomb structures in advancing superconductivity research.

AI.tldr: KZnBi在压力下展现出M形双穹顶超导相，包括结构相变和电子相变，最高Tc达8K
AI.motivation: 研究具有蜂窝晶格结构的材料，因其独特的电子性质和对外部刺激的敏感性，特别是超导性
AI.method: 对KZnBi施加压力，测量超导转变温度Tc，结合理论计算分析电子结构变化
AI.result: 发现压力诱导的M形双穹顶超导相：Tc在2.5GPa达7K，结构相变后下降，7GPa电子相变后重新进入超导相，Tc达8K
AI.conclusion: KZnBi是研究蜂窝晶格多样结构表现和内在现象的理想平台，证明了蜂窝结构在超导研究中的重要性

title: Data-driven, non-Markovian modelling of weather in the presence of non-stationary, non-Gaussian, and heteroskedastic climate dynamics
summary: While the generalized Langevin equation (GLE) is a powerful tool to understand the behavior of complex dissipative systems, driving by external fields renders standard GLE construction workflows invalid. Filtering approaches that separate fluctuations from the non-equilibrium response can sometimes circumvent the need for a non-equilibrium formalism when the residual fluctuations are homoskedastic, stationary, and preferably Gaussian. Here, we introduce the temperature time series from Boulder, Colorado, as representative of the more general and complex case where the filtered time series remains non-Gaussian, non-stationary, and heteroskedastic. With this example, we develop a protocol to build an accurate and efficient low-dimensional description of the weather fluctuations. Our protocol classifies the weather data based on the position in the annual cycle, and introduces local homoskedasticity as a metric to identify seasons of likely stationarity. Within these seasons, we build pseudo-equilibrium models. Leveraging state-based generalized master equation modelling as an alternative to the GLE, we resolve difficulties like non-Gaussianity and position dependence of the memory (friction) kernel. Our data-driven approach accurately reproduces the evolving fluctuations of the Boulder temperature time series, illustrating the feasibility of our method as a general tool to describe driven, dissipative systems.

AI.tldr: 针对非平衡驱动系统的广义朗之万方程构建难题，本文以科罗拉多州博尔德市温度时间序列为例，开发了一种处理非高斯、非平稳、异方差数据的协议，通过季节分类和局部同方差性度量构建伪平衡模型，使用基于状态的广义主方程建模替代GLE。
AI.motivation: 广义朗之万方程（GLE）是理解复杂耗散系统的有力工具，但外部场驱动会使标准GLE构建方法失效。当过滤后的时间序列保持非高斯、非平稳和异方差特性时，需要开发新的非平衡形式化方法。
AI.method: 1. 以博尔德市温度时间序列为复杂案例；2. 根据年周期位置对天气数据进行分类；3. 引入局部同方差性作为识别可能平稳季节的度量；4. 在这些季节内构建伪平衡模型；5. 使用基于状态的广义主方程建模替代GLE，解决非高斯性和记忆核位置依赖等问题。
AI.result: 开发的数据驱动方法能够准确再现博尔德温度时间序列的演化波动，证明了该方法作为描述驱动耗散系统的通用工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的协议成功处理了非高斯、非平稳、异方差的复杂系统，为描述外部驱动下的耗散系统提供了一种有效的通用方法，特别是在传统GLE方法失效的情况下。

title: Topology as a Design Variable for Multiproperty Engineering in Synthesized 4-5-6-8 Carbon Nanoribbons
summary: Nonbenzenoid carbon frameworks expand low-dimensional material design via controlled asymmetry. Here, we show the experimentally realized 4-5-6-8 carbon nanoribbon establishes a topology-driven paradigm for multiproperty engineering, not just a graphene variant. Using hybrid DFT, tight-binding, and molecular dynamics in a multiscale framework, we demonstrate the symmetry-broken lattice stabilizes hierarchical bonds within standard energy ranges. This geometry produces a robust semiconducting state (hybrid gap >1 eV) and enables strain as a controllable modulation parameter. A tight-binding Hamiltonian fitted only at equilibrium accurately captures strain-dependent band evolution, proving the essential physics is topology-dominated. Mechanical analysis reveals high stiffness with fracture governed by the largest polygons, showing asymmetry redistributes stress without compromising integrity. Intrinsic phonon scattering suppresses thermal conductance, enabling favorable thermoelectric performance without extrinsic disorder. Optical response confirms non-equivalent ring connectivity reorganizes interband transitions, promoting strong visible absorption and efficient photocarrier generation. These results position topology as a governing parameter coupling elasticity, electronics, thermal transport, and optics, establishing the 4-5-6-8 nanoribbon as a unified platform for predictive design of multifunctional carbon materials.

AI.tldr: 实验合成的4-5-6-8碳纳米带通过拓扑控制实现多性质工程，证明非苯环碳框架可作为多功能材料设计平台。
AI.motivation: 探索非苯环碳框架在低维材料设计中的潜力，研究拓扑结构如何主导多种物理性质的耦合调控。
AI.method: 采用多尺度框架：混合密度泛函理论、紧束缚模型和分子动力学模拟，分析对称性破缺晶格的稳定性、电子结构和力学性质。
AI.result: 该纳米带具有稳定的半导体态（带隙>1 eV），应变可调谐电子结构，高机械刚度，低热导率，强可见光吸收和高效光生载流子生成。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑结构成为耦合弹性、电子、热输运和光学性质的主导参数，4-5-6-8纳米带为多功能碳材料的预测性设计提供了统一平台。

title: Thermal conductivity of CdCr$_{2}$Se$_{4}$ ferromagnet at low temperatures: role of grain boundaries and porosity
summary: It is unambiguously demonstrated that the low temperature magnon specific heat in a ferromagnet varies as T$^{3/2}$ and the magnon thermal conductivity, due to T$^{1/2}$ - dependent effective velocity of magnons, as T$^{2}$. The confirmation of these model comportments is based on the experimental study of chalcospinel CdCr$_{2}$Se$_{4}$, which represents relatively rare example of a ferromagnetic insulator (T$_{C}$ = 130 K) without undesirable masking contributions of the itinerant electron excitations and nuclear specific heat that both make impossible to conclusively unveil the role of magnons. The ratio of the magnon to lattice specific heat is found to reach 87:13 at 2 K and is in accordance with predictions based on the spin-wave stiffness D = 33.5 meVA$^{2}$ and Debye temperature $θ_{D}$ = 237 K. On the other hand, the ratio of the magnon to phonon thermal conductivity reaching 27:73 at 2 K is much lower than expected for standard model of the grain boundary limited transport. This suggests that mean free paths for long-wavelength magnon/phonon heat carriers are largely different - shorter than the grain size (of 1$μ$m) for magnons and longer than grain size for phonons. The phonon dominated low temperature thermal conductivity exhibits, moreover, a T$^{2.3}$ temperature dependence instead of the standard predicted model in T$^{3}$. The relevant scattering mechanisms, both the phonon frequency independent and dependent ones, are discussed in detail.

AI.tldr: 实验证实铁磁绝缘体CdCr₂Se₄中磁振子比热遵循T^{3/2}规律，热导率遵循T²规律，澄清了磁振子在低温下的热输运行为
AI.motivation: 澄清铁磁体中磁振子的低温热输运行为，传统研究常被电子激发和核比热等干扰因素掩盖，需要寻找合适的铁磁绝缘体材料进行验证
AI.method: 选择铁磁绝缘体CdCr₂Se₄（Tc=130K）作为研究对象，测量其低温比热和热导率，分析磁振子和声子的贡献比例及温度依赖关系
AI.result: 在2K时磁振子与晶格比热比为87:13，与理论预测一致；但热导率中磁振子与声子比例为27:73，远低于预期，表明长波长磁振子平均自由程小于晶粒尺寸（1μm），而声子平均自由程更长
AI.conclusion: 实验明确证实了铁磁体中磁振子比热的T^{3/2}规律和热导率的T²规律，但发现磁振子热输运效率低于预期，表明存在额外的散射机制，同时观察到声子热导率呈现T^{2.3}而非理论预测的T³关系

title: Proliferation transitions from a topological phase in $2+1$ dimensions
summary: We consider phase transitions out of a general topological phase in $2+1$ dimensions. We assume that the transition is triggered by a single Abelian anyon, which becomes light near the transition and whose worldlines proliferate after the transition. (This proliferation is often referred to as ``condensation.'') We describe the transition using a continuum field theory obtained by coupling the corresponding topological quantum field theory (TQFT) to a single complex scalar field associated with this anyon. With these assumptions, we find the most general relativistic field theory for such a transition. Even though for a given TQFT and a choice of anyon, there are infinitely many such field theories, the transition theory depends on only a single additional integer parameter. We analyze all these theories, their global symmetries, and their phases. In generic cases, the theory after the transition can be related to the original one via an Abelian hierarchy construction. In special cases, the theory after the transition is gapless, and with a particular deformation, it is related to the original TQFT by gauging an anomaly-free one-form global symmetry. We also explore the enrichment of this setup by a global U(1) symmetry. In some cases, enriching the original TQFT is incompatible with the full transition theory. Finally, we demonstrate our construction with many specific examples.

AI.tldr: 研究2+1维拓扑相变，聚焦于由单个阿贝尔任意子触发的相变，通过耦合拓扑量子场论与复标量场描述相变过程。
AI.motivation: 探索一般拓扑相在2+1维中的相变机制，特别是由单个阿贝尔任意子"凝聚"触发的相变，理解拓扑相变的理论框架和普遍特征。
AI.method: 将拓扑量子场论与描述任意子的复标量场耦合，构建最一般的相对论性场论；分析整数参数的影响、全局对称性及不同相。
AI.result: 发现相变理论仅依赖于一个额外的整数参数；一般情况可通过阿贝尔层次构造关联相变前后理论；特殊情况得到无能隙理论，可通过规范一形式全局对称性关联原拓扑相。
AI.conclusion: 建立了描述2+1维拓扑相变的统一理论框架，揭示了相变参数化、对称性约束及相变后理论的普适特征，并通过具体示例验证了构造的有效性。

title: General linear correction method for DFT+X energy: application to U-M (M=Al, Ga, In) alloys under high pressure
summary: DFT+X methods, such as DFT+U and DFT+DMFT, are important supplements to standard density functional theory when strong on-site Coulomb interactions are present. However, the involvement of external parameters in the underlying model Hamiltonian introduces intrinsic ambiguity when comparing the total energies obtained with different model parameters. This renders DFT+X approaches semi-empirical and severely hinders their capability to describe phase ordering and phase stability, especially when reliable experimental benchmarks are unavailable, such as under high pressure. In this work, we resolve this longstanding problem by proposing a general linear correction method that eliminates the ambiguous energy contributions introduced by the model Hamiltonian in DFT+X approaches, thereby enabling direct comparison of their energies calculated with different interaction parameters. The method is demonstrated and validated within the framework of DFT+U, an important member of the DFT+X family. It is then applied to important nuclear materials of uranium-based binaries U-M (M=Al, Ga, In) alloys. With this approach, we resolve the long-standing discrepancy between theoretical predictions and experimental observations of phase stability with unprecedented accuracy, and predict several previously unknown stable intermetallic compounds under high pressure. The broad applicability of the method is further confirmed by accurate predictions of formation enthalpies for diverse systems, including Np-Al, U-Si, and Cu-O binaries, the ternary MnSnAu compound, and oxygen adsorption on the Cu(111) surface. This work establishes linear-corrected DFT+U as a fully first-principles approach and validates the linear correction method as a robust and general scheme that can be readily extended to other DFT+X methods.

AI.tldr: 提出线性校正方法消除DFT+X方法中模型参数引入的模糊能量贡献，使不同参数下的能量可直接比较，解决相稳定性预测难题
AI.motivation: DFT+X方法（如DFT+U、DFT+DMFT）在处理强库仑相互作用时依赖外部参数，导致不同参数下的总能量无法直接比较，限制了相稳定性和相序预测能力，尤其在缺乏实验基准的高压条件下
AI.method: 提出通用线性校正方法，消除DFT+X方法中模型哈密顿量引入的模糊能量贡献。以DFT+U为例进行演示验证，通过线性校正使不同U参数下的能量可直接比较
AI.result: 1. 解决了铀基二元合金U-M（M=Al, Ga, In）相稳定性理论与实验长期不一致的问题；2. 预测了高压下多个先前未知的稳定金属间化合物；3. 在Np-Al、U-Si、Cu-O二元系、三元MnSnAu化合物及Cu(111)表面氧吸附等多样体系中验证了方法的普适性和准确性
AI.conclusion: 线性校正方法使DFT+U成为完全第一性原理方法，该方法稳健通用，可轻松扩展到其他DFT+X方法，为强关联系统的相稳定性预测提供了可靠工具

title: Generalized quantum master equation from memory kernel coupling theory
summary: The generalized quantum master equation provides a powerful framework for non-Markovian dynamics of open quantum systems. However, the accurate and efficient evaluation of the memory kernel remains a challenge. In this work, we introduce a comprehensive tensorial extension to the Memory Kernel Coupling Theory (MKCT) to overcome this bottleneck. By elevating the original scalar formalism to a tensorial framework, the extended MKCT enables the calculation of general expectation values and cross-correlation functions. We demonstrate the numerical accuracy and efficiency of this method across multiple benchmark systems: capturing transient populations and coherences in the spin-boson model, resolving the excitonic absorption spectrum of the Fenna-Matthews-Olson complex, and simulating charge mobility in one-dimensional lattice models. These successful applications establish the tensorial MKCT as a highly efficient tool for investigating complex dynamics in open quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了张量扩展的记忆核耦合理论（MKCT），用于高效计算开放量子系统中的非马尔可夫动力学，能够处理一般期望值和交叉关联函数。
AI.motivation: 广义量子主方程为开放量子系统的非马尔可夫动力学提供了强大框架，但记忆核的准确高效计算仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: 通过将原始的标量形式提升为张量框架，扩展了记忆核耦合理论（MKCT），使其能够计算一般期望值和交叉关联函数。
AI.result: 在多个基准系统中验证了方法的数值准确性和效率：捕获自旋-玻色子模型中的瞬态布居和相干性，解析Fenna-Matthews-Olson复合物的激子吸收光谱，模拟一维晶格模型中的电荷迁移率。
AI.conclusion: 张量MKCT被确立为研究开放量子系统中复杂动力学的高效工具。

title: Liquid Metals Routes towards Making Superconductors
summary: We conceive liquid-metal-derived superconductors (LMDS) as a unified paradigm that enables the quick fabrication of superconducting materials under near-ambient conditions through introducing room-temperature liquid metals (LMs) as dynamic metallic reaction media. In this framework, a single liquid, typically a gallium or bismuth-based alloy, simultaneously serves as solvent, dopant, interfacial mediator, and superconducting host, thereby providing a route that is inherently superior to the high-temperature, high-pressure, and multistep procedures characteristic of current synthesis methods. This paradigm integrates LM-enabled pathways for producing bulk alloys, printed films, two-dimensional confined phases, wires, and nanodroplets, all of which exhibit intrinsic flexibility, self-healing behavior, and compatibility with soft-matter electronics. We further outline a data-driven LM materials genome that unifies composition, structure, ground-state quantities, interaction parameters, and macroscopic properties to accelerate predictive modeling and inverse design of LMDS. Beyond processing advantages, LMs provide an experimental platform for examining superconductivity in amorphous, nanoconfined, and dynamically disordered states and for revisiting the longstanding question of whether true superconductivity can exist in liquid state. This perspective positions LMs as a fertile and energy-efficient route toward reconfigurable and potentially transformative superconducting technologies.

AI.tldr: 液态金属衍生超导体（LMDS）作为一种统一范式，通过引入室温液态金属作为动态金属反应介质，可在近环境条件下快速制备超导材料。
AI.motivation: 当前超导材料合成方法通常需要高温、高压和多步程序，过程复杂且能耗高。液态金属提供了一种更简单、更节能的替代方案，同时为研究非晶态、纳米受限和动态无序状态下的超导性提供了实验平台。
AI.method: 使用室温液态金属（如镓或铋基合金）作为动态反应介质，同时充当溶剂、掺杂剂、界面介质和超导主体。该范式整合了液态金属途径来制备块体合金、印刷薄膜、二维受限相、导线和纳米液滴。
AI.result: 液态金属衍生超导体展现出固有柔性、自修复行为和与软物质电子学的兼容性。建立了数据驱动的液态金属材料基因组，统一了成分、结构、基态量、相互作用参数和宏观性质，加速了LMDS的预测建模和逆向设计。
AI.conclusion: 液态金属为可重构和潜在变革性超导技术提供了一条肥沃且节能的途径，同时为研究液态超导性等基础科学问题提供了实验平台。

title: Coarse-grained Shannon entropy of random walks with shrinking steps
summary: In one-dimensional diffusive processes with discrete steps characterized by geometrically decaying magnitudes, the usual Gaussian broadening familiar from Brownian motion is replaced by bounded probability distributions over particle positions that are characterized by multi-scale fractal structures. In this work, we study random walks with shrinking steps (known as Bernoulli convolutions), focusing on their behavior in the vicinity of the dyadic contraction ratio 1/2. Our analytical and numerical results show that the coarse-grained Shannon entropy of particle distributions induced by Bernoulli convolutions exhibits a local maximum at the dyadic ratio, arising from the competition between diffusive spreading, which increases entropy, and emergent fine structure, which tends to decrease it. This entropy maximum is a general property of systems driven by non-Gaussian discrete noise, whose dynamics near stable fixed points can be viewed as an autoregressive process - an approximation that is mathematically equivalent to unbiased random walks with shrinking steps. We discuss potential implications of Bernoulli convolution dynamics for protocell self-replication and vesicle proliferation, establishing a link between our information-theoretic approach and biophysical models of cell division.

AI.tldr: 研究几何衰减步长的随机游走（伯努利卷积），发现在二分收缩比1/2附近，粗粒度香农熵出现局部最大值，源于扩散扩展与精细结构之间的竞争。
AI.motivation: 研究具有几何衰减步长的扩散过程中概率分布的特性，特别是当步长收缩时（伯努利卷积），在二分收缩比1/2附近的行为。这种非高斯离散噪声驱动的系统在稳定不动点附近的动力学可以视为自回归过程。
AI.method: 使用分析和数值方法研究伯努利卷积随机游走，计算粒子分布的粗粒度香农熵，考察在二分收缩比1/2附近的行为。
AI.result: 伯努利卷积诱导的粒子分布在二分收缩比1/2处表现出粗粒度香农熵的局部最大值。这是扩散扩展（增加熵）与涌现的精细结构（减少熵）之间竞争的结果。
AI.conclusion: 熵最大值是非高斯离散噪声驱动系统的普遍特性。伯努利卷积动力学与原细胞自我复制和囊泡增殖有潜在联系，建立了信息论方法与细胞分裂生物物理模型之间的桥梁。

title: Non-equilibrium transport reveals energy level degeneracy
summary: We demonstrate a method to determine energy level degeneracies using non-equilibrium electronic transport through voltage-biased quantum dots. We establish the general validity of this approach using single and double quantum dots in bilayer graphene and GaAs. Unlike established methods based on entropy measurements or time-resolved tunneling statistics, our approach achieves comparable precision without requiring calibrated electron heating or real-time charge detection. We resolve the predicted symmetric shell structure in bilayer graphene quantum dots, including a singlet ground state at half filling and the ground state degeneracies of the first 13 carriers. Extending the method to double quantum dots, we observe degeneracy doubling associated with bonding and antibonding orbitals for a single carrier and a fourfold degeneracy for two carriers, previously inaccessible with existing techniques. These results establish a conceptually general and experimentally straightforward approach for probing energy level degeneracies in complex quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过电压偏置量子点非平衡电子输运测量能级简并度的新方法，无需校准电子加热或实时电荷检测
AI.motivation: 现有测量量子系统能级简并度的方法（如基于熵测量或时间分辨隧穿统计）需要复杂的校准或实时检测技术，限制了实验简便性和应用范围
AI.method: 利用电压偏置量子点的非平衡电子输运特性，通过分析输运信号确定能级简并度，在双层石墨烯和GaAs的单量子点和双量子点系统中验证
AI.result: 成功解析了双层石墨烯量子点的对称壳层结构，包括半填充时的单重态基态和前13个载流子的基态简并度；在双量子点中观察到单载流子的键合/反键合轨道简并加倍和双载流子的四重简并
AI.conclusion: 该方法为探测复杂量子系统的能级简并度提供了一种概念通用、实验简便的新途径，超越了现有技术的局限性

title: Mixed Organic Cation in Chiral Two-Dimensional Organic-Inorganic Hybrid Metal Halides: An ab-initio Study of Nonlinear Optical (NLO) Properties
summary: The mixing of organic cations represents yet another direction to explore in the field of chiral organic-inorganic hybrid metal halides (OIHMH). Here, we perform structural optimizations, electronic structures, and non-linear optical (NLO) studies using the density functional theory of two recently synthesized chiral OIHMHs, [R-MePEA][C3A]PbBr4, and [R-MePEA][C4A]PbBr4, with mixed chiral arylammonium and achiral alkylammonium cations. We find that the noncovalent weak interactions (e.g. Br...NH interactions) play an important role in the formation of these OIHMHs. Our study further indicates that the two non-centrosymmetric compounds exhibit relative wide bandgaps (~3.5 eV), strong second harmonic generation (SHG) responses (~0.5-1.5*KDP), and moderate birefringence (~0.088), indicating possible applications NLO materials. Atom response theory analysis reveals that the SHG responses are determined mainly by the occupied Br 3p non-bonding orbitals as well as by the unoccupied Pb 5p orbitals which shows the important contribution of the inorganic PbBr4 layer to the nonlinear optical properties.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过密度泛函理论分析两种手性有机-无机杂化金属卤化物[R-MePEA][C3A]PbBr4和[R-MePEA][C4A]PbBr4的结构、电子性质和非线性光学特性，发现它们具有宽禁带、强二次谐波产生响应和适中双折射，表明在非线性光学材料中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索有机阳离子混合在手性有机-无机杂化金属卤化物领域的新方向，研究混合手性芳基铵和消旋烷基铵阳离子对材料性能的影响。
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论对两种新合成的手性OIHMHs进行结构优化、电子结构计算和非线性光学研究，包括能带结构、二次谐波产生响应和双折射分析，并采用原子响应理论分析非线性光学响应的来源。
AI.result: 发现两种非中心对称化合物具有相对较宽的禁带宽度(~3.5 eV)、强的二次谐波产生响应(~0.5-1.5*KDP)和适中的双折射(~0.088)。非共价弱相互作用(如Br...NH相互作用)在材料形成中起重要作用。原子响应理论分析表明SHG响应主要来自占据的Br 3p非键轨道和未占据的Pb 5p轨道，显示无机PbBr4层对非线性光学性质的重要贡献。
AI.conclusion: 混合有机阳离子的手性有机-无机杂化金属卤化物具有优异的非线性光学性能，特别是强的二次谐波产生响应，表明它们作为非线性光学材料的应用潜力。无机PbBr4层对非线性光学性质起关键作用。

title: Altermagnetic XMCD in Hematite Distinct from Weak Ferromagnetic Contributions
summary: Altermagnets are compensated collinear magnets that break time-reversal symmetry without net magnetization, enabling unconventional magneto-optical responses. Here, altermagnetic X-ray magnetic circular dichroism (XMCD) is experimentally demonstrated in hematite $α$-Fe$_2$O$_3$. By employing a symmetry-selective geometry in which the x-ray propagation vector is orthogonal to the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya-induced weak ferromagnetic moment, we isolate a finite XMCD signal that cannot be attributed to conventional weak ferromagnetism. Moreover, we demonstrate that distinct altermagnetic states characterized by different magnetic symmetries can be reversibly switched through the application of an in-plane external magnetic field. Full-multiplet calculations reveal that the signal originates from an anisotropic magnetic dipole moment realized in the $2p^53d^6$ excited states, despite the isotropic $2p^63d^5$ ground state. Our results establish XMCD as a direct probe of excited-state magnetic multipoles and provide a general route for the optical detection of altermagnetic order in compensated magnets.

AI.tldr: 在赤铁矿α-Fe₂O₃中实验证实了交变磁体的X射线磁圆二色性，通过对称性选择几何构型分离出无法归因于传统弱铁磁性的信号，并展示了不同磁对称性的交变磁态可通过外加磁场可逆切换。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体作为补偿共线磁体，在无净磁化的情况下破坏时间反演对称性，具有非常规磁光响应特性。然而，如何直接探测这种补偿磁体中的交变磁序是一个重要挑战。
AI.method: 采用对称性选择几何构型，使X射线传播矢量垂直于Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya诱导的弱铁磁矩，从而分离出交变磁信号。结合全多重态计算分析激发态磁性多极子，并通过面内外加磁场实现不同磁对称性交变磁态的可逆切换。
AI.result: 在赤铁矿α-Fe₂O₃中成功观测到有限XMCD信号，该信号无法归因于传统弱铁磁性。全多重态计算表明信号来源于2p⁵3d⁶激发态中实现的各向异性磁偶极矩，尽管基态2p⁶3d⁵是各向同性的。实现了不同交变磁态的可逆磁开关。
AI.conclusion: XMCD可作为激发态磁性多极子的直接探针，为补偿磁体中交变磁序的光学检测提供了一般性途径，建立了探测交变磁性的新方法。

title: Deformation mechanisms and compressive response of NbTaTiZr alloy via machine learning potentials
summary: Refractory multi-principal element alloys (MPEAs) are key research focus for excellent high-temp properties and engineering potential. Deformation mechanisms/mechanical behaviors of quaternary NbTaTiZr MPEA under high strain rates/extreme temps remain unclear. We built a variable-composition ML potential for NbTaTiZr, combined with MD simulations to study effects of crystal orientation, strain rate, temp, composition on compressive mechanics. NbTaTiZr shows structural/mechanical anisotropy in compression [111] max yield strength, [110] min (prone to twinning), [100] via local disorder/dislocation slip (dominant 1/2<111> dislocations). At 10^10 s^-1, yield strength rises sharply, disordered structures increase; high strain rates suppress dislocations to promote disordering. Retains high strength at 2100 K. Higher Nb/Ta boosts yield strength, Ti/Zr reduce it. Reveals MPEA mechanical anisotropy and strain-rate-dependent disordering, guiding high-performance refractory alloy design.

AI.tldr: 研究通过机器学习势函数和分子动力学模拟，揭示了NbTaTiZr多元合金在极端条件下的力学各向异性、应变率依赖性无序化机制及其成分影响规律。
AI.motivation: 耐火多元合金（MPEAs）因其优异的高温性能和工程潜力成为研究热点，但四元NbTaTiZr合金在高应变率和极端温度下的变形机制和力学行为尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建了NbTaTiZr的可变成分机器学习势函数，结合分子动力学模拟研究晶体取向、应变率、温度和成分对压缩力学性能的影响。
AI.result: NbTaTiZr在压缩中表现出结构和力学各向异性：[111]方向屈服强度最高，[110]方向最低（易发生孪晶），[100]方向通过局部无序和位错滑移（以1/2<111>位错为主）。在10^10 s^-1高应变率下，屈服强度急剧上升，无序结构增加；高应变率抑制位错促进无序化。在2100K仍保持高强度。较高Nb/Ta含量提高屈服强度，Ti/Zr含量降低强度。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了MPEA的力学各向异性和应变率依赖性无序化机制，为高性能耐火合金设计提供了指导。

title: Weiner's theory for exactly solvable Schrödinger equation with symmetric double well potential
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, accepted for publication to Computational and Theoretical Chemistry
summary: The Weiner's theory (WT) is developed on the basis of the exactly solvable Schrödinger equation with trigonometric double-well potential (TDWP). The symmetric case of TDWP is considered. This modified version of WT (mWT) enables one to eliminate some severe approximations of the original Weiner's approach and to obtain more accurate results. An analytic formula is derived which provides the calculation of the proton transfer rate with the help of elements implemented in {\sl {Mathematica}}. We exemplify the application of mWT by calculating the proton transfer rate constant in the hydrogen bond of the proton-bound ammonia dimer cation ${\rm{N_2H_7^{+}}}$ (${\rm{H_3N\cdot\cdot\cdot H^{+} \cdot\cdot\cdot NH_3}}$). The parameters of the model for this object are extracted from available literature data on IR spectroscopy and quantum chemical calculations. The approach yields the transition from the Arrhenius-like exponential temperature dependence characteristic of thermal activation to that of quantum tunneling. Besides it is well suited for describing the phenomenon of vibrationally enhanced tunnelling.

AI.tldr: 论文基于三角双阱势的精确可解薛定谔方程发展了Weiner理论，改进了原理论中的严重近似，推导出质子转移速率的解析公式，并应用于氨二聚体阳离子的质子转移过程。
AI.motivation: 原始Weiner理论存在严重近似，需要发展更精确的理论方法来计算质子转移速率，特别是要能够描述从热激活到量子隧穿的转变过程。
AI.method: 基于三角双阱势的精确可解薛定谔方程，发展了改进的Weiner理论，推导出质子转移速率的解析公式，并应用于N₂H₇⁺体系的质子转移过程，参数从IR光谱和量子化学计算数据中提取。
AI.result: 改进理论能够准确描述从Arrhenius型热激活温度依赖到量子隧穿的转变，适用于描述振动增强隧穿现象，并成功计算了氨二聚体阳离子的质子转移速率常数。
AI.conclusion: 改进的Weiner理论消除了原始理论的严重近似，提供了更准确的质子转移速率计算方法，能够统一描述热激活和量子隧穿机制，适用于振动增强隧穿现象的研究。

title: $σ$ bands driven high-temperature superconductivity in hydrogenated hexagonal BC$_3$ monolayer
summary: Material with metallic $σ$-bonding bands is expected to be a high-temperature superconductor, due to the sensitivity of $σ$ electrons to lattice vibration. Based on the first-principles calculations, electronic structures of hydrogenated BC$_3$ monolayers (H$_n$-B$_2$C$_6$ with $n$=1-8) are systematically investigated. At high coverage of hydrogen, the monolayer stabilizes in chair-like $sp^3$-hybridized configurations, leading to the metallization of $σ$ bands, especially in H$_7$-B$_2$C$_6$ and H$_8$-B$_2$C$_6$. This metallicity originates from the electron deficiency of boron, compared with insulating graphane. Utilizing Wannier interpolation, the electron-phonon coupling strengths for metallic phases of H$_n$-B$_2$C$_6$ are determined. As expected, strong couplings are identified between the conducting $σ$ electrons and low-frequency phonon modes. By solving the anisotropic Eliashberg equations, we confirm that H$_7$-B$_2$C$_6$ and H$_8$-B$_2$C$_6$ are single-gap superconductors with critical temperature being 87 K, exceeding the boiling point of liquid nitrogen. Considering that monolayer BC$_3$ has been synthesized in experiment, our results demonstrate that hydrogenation of two-dimensional BC$_3$ provides a viable pathway to achieve high-temperature superconductivity at ambient pressure.

AI.tldr: 通过氢化BC₃单层材料，在H₇-B₂C₆和H₈-B₂C₆中实现了σ键金属化，获得87K的高温超导性，超过液氮沸点。
AI.motivation: 具有金属性σ键的材料预期具有高温超导特性，因为σ电子对晶格振动敏感。研究氢化BC₃单层材料能否实现这一目标。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算，系统研究氢化BC₃单层材料(Hₙ-B₂C₆, n=1-8)的电子结构。使用Wannier插值确定金属相的电子-声子耦合强度，通过求解各向异性Eliashberg方程分析超导特性。
AI.result: 高氢覆盖率下，材料稳定在椅状sp³杂化构型，导致σ带金属化，特别是在H₇-B₂C₆和H₈-B₂C₆中。这些材料显示出强电子-声子耦合，临界温度达到87K，超过液氮沸点，是单能隙超导体。
AI.conclusion: 氢化二维BC₃单层材料为实现常压高温超导提供了可行途径，且BC₃单层已在实验中合成，具有实际应用前景。

title: Simple models for mesoscopic systems: from slender structures to stochastic resetting
summary:
The objective of this thesis is to advance the understanding of complex physical phenomena through the lens of statistical physics. Specifically, it addresses two fundamental questions: What types of interactions can induce buckling of slender structures when their temperature is increased? And, how can we devise an optimal strategy for locating a hidden target? The thesis is divided into two distinct parts, both employing mesoscopic descriptions -- neither fully microscopic nor fully macroscopic -- to capture the essential interactions and behaviours that qualitatively govern the phenomena under investigation.
  In the first part, we examine the buckling behavior of low-dimensional materials under thermal load. To this end, we develop a comprehensive model that characterises the system using a minimal setup for mimicking: (i) elastic and electronic degrees of freedom, and (ii) coupling between the elastic and the electronic modes.
  In the second part, we investigate stochastic resetting processes as a means to formulate efficient search strategies. We explore various resetting mechanisms to understand how to optimise the search performance in real scenarios, where: (i) resetting involves a finite cost, and (ii) the target location is only partially known.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过统计物理方法研究两个问题：热致细长结构屈曲的相互作用机制，以及有限成本下部分信息目标的最优搜索策略。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在通过统计物理方法深入理解复杂物理现象，特别关注两个基本问题：1）温度升高时哪些相互作用会导致细长结构屈曲；2）如何设计最优策略来定位隐藏目标。
AI.method: 采用介观尺度描述方法，既非完全微观也非完全宏观，捕捉现象的本质相互作用和行为。第一部分建立包含弹性和电子自由度及其耦合的综合模型；第二部分研究具有有限成本和部分目标信息的随机重置过程。
AI.result: 论文分为两部分：第一部分建立了热致屈曲的介观模型，第二部分提出了有限成本下部分信息目标的最优搜索策略。
AI.conclusion: 通过介观尺度的统计物理方法，该研究为理解热致结构屈曲机制和设计高效搜索策略提供了新视角，展示了介观描述在复杂物理现象研究中的有效性。

title: Programmable Dirac masses in hybrid moiré--1D superlattices
summary: Twisted moiré Dirac systems enable powerful miniband engineering but are largely fixed once the twist angle is set, whereas unidirectional (1D) electrostatic superlattices offer continuous control of Dirac anisotropy; yet robust single-particle gaps at charge neutrality are generally difficult to obtain in either setting. Here we show that combining the two into a hybrid moiré--1D superlattice provides a gate-defined configuration space that hosts both gap-opening resonances and strongly anisotropic gapless regimes. Using full-wave continuum miniband calculations for twisted bilayer graphene, we map the charge-neutrality-point (CNP) gap versus the 1D wavevector $\mathbf G_{\rm 1D}$ and identify a Dirac--Dirac resonance condition. At resonance, a single-particle CNP gap emerges from a parity--chirality selection rule for the resonant inter-cone coupling, which can be electrically reprogrammed by layer-asymmetric modulation that switches the relative chirality and the active mass channel. The insulating phase persists within a finite near-resonant window, providing quantitative fabrication tolerances, while off-resonant settings remain gapless but enable strong suppression of the transverse Dirac velocity and continuous anisotropic band renormalization. Hybrid moiré--1D superlattices thus provide a practical route to programmable Dirac minibands and electrically selectable mass channels in coupled Dirac systems.

AI.tldr: 结合扭曲莫尔狄拉克系统和一维静电超晶格，通过门电压调控实现可编程狄拉克微带和电选择性质量通道
AI.motivation: 扭曲莫尔狄拉克系统虽然能实现强大的微带工程，但一旦扭转角固定就难以改变；而一维静电超晶格虽然能连续调控狄拉克各向异性，但通常在电荷中性点难以获得稳定的单粒子能隙。本文旨在结合两者的优势。
AI.method: 使用全波连续介质微带计算方法，研究扭曲双层石墨烯中的混合莫尔-一维超晶格系统，分析电荷中性点能隙随一维波矢的变化，识别狄拉克-狄拉克共振条件。
AI.result: 在共振条件下，通过宇称-手性选择规则产生单粒子电荷中性点能隙，可通过层不对称调制电编程切换相对手性和活性质量通道。绝缘相在有限近共振窗口内持续存在，而离共振设置保持无隙但能强烈抑制横向狄拉克速度。
AI.conclusion: 混合莫尔-一维超晶格为耦合狄拉克系统中的可编程狄拉克微带和电选择性质量通道提供了实用途径。

title: Kinetics of Stacking Order Evolution During Heterogeneous Ice Formation
summary: The selection of stacking order in a broad range of close-packed polymorphic materials remains a challenging enigma. Using in situ cryogenic transmission electron microscopy, we uncover the atomistic mechanisms governing the vapour deposition growth of ice. We find that the heterogeneous ice nucleation and growth undergoes recrystallization accompanied by bifurcation, reflecting a coherent epitaxial transition from a cubic-ice embryonic core to hexagonal-ice prismatic dendrites, with intermediate stacking-disordered layers serving as a dynamic fluctuating bridge. Supported by molecular dynamics simulations, these phenomena are attributed to a surface-constrained, symmetry-breaking crystallization preference aligned with the principle of minimizing free energy. Our results highlight the critical role of the combined effects of surface and symmetry in shaping ice crystallization, providing fresh insights into crystal growth mechanisms and guiding principles for the design of advanced materials.

AI.tldr: 利用原位低温透射电镜揭示了冰蒸气沉积生长的原子机制，发现异质冰成核和生长经历再结晶和分叉过程，从立方冰胚胎核向六方冰棱柱枝晶转变，中间堆叠无序层作为动态波动桥梁。
AI.motivation: 解决广泛密堆积多晶材料中堆叠顺序选择的难题，理解冰结晶的基本机制，为先进材料设计提供指导。
AI.method: 采用原位低温透射电子显微镜观察冰蒸气沉积生长过程，结合分子动力学模拟验证实验现象。
AI.result: 发现冰异质成核和生长经历再结晶和分叉，从立方冰胚胎核向六方冰棱柱枝晶发生相干外延转变，中间堆叠无序层作为动态波动桥梁。这些现象归因于表面约束的对称性破缺结晶偏好，符合自由能最小化原理。
AI.conclusion: 表面和对称性的联合效应在塑造冰结晶过程中起关键作用，为理解晶体生长机制和先进材料设计提供了新见解。

title: Magnetoresistance in the helical itinerant magnets MnSi and Mn$_{1-x}$Co$_x$Si
summary: We studied the longitudinal and transverse magnetoresistance of helical magnets, MnSi and Mn$_{1-x}$Co$_x$Si, at temperatures between 1.8 and 100~K and in magnetic fields up to 9 Tesla. All substances exhibited negative longitudinal and transverse magnetoresistance at temperatures above 4~K, which is most likely related to the suppression of spin fluctuations by the magnetic field. Note that in contrast to our finding, the longitudinal magnetoresistance of ferromagnetic metals was found to be positive. The unique positive and anisotropic magnetoresistance of pure MnSi at low temperatures (1.8 and 4~K) in the induced ferromagnetic phase shows effective suppression of fluctuations by the magnetic field. The significant difference in behavior between pure MnSi and doped MnSi lies in the specifics of the latter material, which forms a sort of helical fluctuation cloud and reveals quantum critical properties at low temperatures. The observed isotropic magnetoresistance in MnSi and Mn$_{1-x}$Co$_x$Si at higher temperatures can tentatively be attributed to the shortening of the mean free path of electrical carriers due to scattering on magnetic fluctuations and impurities, which results in a suppression of Lorentz force effects.

AI.tldr: 研究螺旋磁体MnSi和Mn₁₋ₓCoₓSi在1.8-100K温度和9T磁场下的纵向与横向磁阻，发现高温下负磁阻效应，低温下MnSi呈现独特的正各向异性磁阻。
AI.motivation: 研究螺旋磁体（特别是MnSi及其Co掺杂体系）的磁阻行为，探索磁场对自旋涨落的抑制效应，比较螺旋磁体与铁磁金属在磁阻行为上的差异。
AI.method: 在1.8-100K温度范围和高达9T的磁场下，测量MnSi和Mn₁₋ₓCoₓSi的纵向与横向磁阻，分析不同温度区间的磁阻行为特征。
AI.result: 1. 所有样品在4K以上温度都表现出负的纵向和横向磁阻，与磁场抑制自旋涨落相关；2. 纯MnSi在低温（1.8和4K）诱导铁磁相中表现出独特的正各向异性磁阻；3. 掺杂MnSi在低温下形成螺旋涨落云并显示量子临界特性；4. 高温下观察到的各向同性磁阻归因于载流子平均自由程缩短。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋磁体的磁阻行为与铁磁金属显著不同，磁场对自旋涨落的抑制是负磁阻的主要机制，而纯MnSi在低温下的正各向异性磁阻反映了磁场对涨落的有效抑制，掺杂体系则表现出量子临界特性。

title: Competing adsorption of H and CO on Pd-alloy surfaces: Mechanistic insight into the mitigating effect of Cu on CO poisoning
summary:
Multi-component alloys offer broad tunability for addressing challenges in materials science, but their vast configurational space makes their surface chemistry highly sensitive to operating conditions, for example through adsorption and segregation. Here, we study Pd-Au-Cu alloy surfaces in H$_2$ and CO environments motivated by their use in H technologies, in particular plasmonic H$_2$ sensing, where alloying can mitigate limitations intrinsic to Pd such as hysteresis and CO poisoning. Modeling multicomponent surfaces with multiple adsorbate species under realistic conditions is challenging. To this end, we establish an accurate and efficient framework that combines machine-learned interatomic potentials trained on density functional theory data to generate training data for cluster expansions with effectively no limitations on training set size.
  By constructing continuous surface phase diagrams for H-CO coadsorption we find that coadsorption under operating conditions is governed primarily by the H coverage during annealing. Au-rich surfaces, formed under H-poor conditions, suppress both CO and H adsorption, while H-rich conditions yield Pd-rich surfaces that maintain higher H coverages compared to Pd at relevant CO partial pressures, indicating improved CO poisoning resistance. This effect is insensitive to relative amounts of Au and Cu, despite experimental evidence of the mitigating effect of specifically Cu on CO poisoning. Kinetic barriers for dilute alloy surfaces indicate that absorption pathways near Au are highly unfavorable, while Cu leave the energetics unchanged compared to pure Pd. This finding suggests that Cu in the surface region provides viable pathways to shuttle H into the material when Pd-dominated paths are blocked by CO.

AI.tldr: 该研究建立了机器学习势函数与团簇展开相结合的高效框架，用于模拟Pd-Au-Cu合金表面在H₂和CO环境中的吸附行为，发现H覆盖度是决定表面组成和抗CO中毒性能的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 多组分合金在材料科学中具有广泛可调性，但其巨大的构型空间使表面化学对操作条件高度敏感。Pd合金在氢技术应用中存在滞后和CO中毒等固有局限性，合金化有望缓解这些问题。
AI.method: 建立了结合机器学习势函数和团簇展开的准确高效框架：使用密度泛函理论数据训练机器学习势函数，生成团簇展开的训练数据，构建连续的H-CO共吸附表面相图。
AI.result: 发现共吸附主要受退火过程中H覆盖度控制：H贫乏条件下形成富Au表面，抑制CO和H吸附；H丰富条件下形成富Pd表面，在相关CO分压下保持比纯Pd更高的H覆盖度，表明抗CO中毒性能改善。Cu在表面区域为H进入材料提供了可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多组分合金表面化学提供了高效建模框架，揭示了Pd-Au-Cu合金在氢技术应用中抗CO中毒的机制，特别是Cu在表面区域为H进入材料提供了替代路径，有助于设计更耐CO中毒的合金材料。

title: A Relationship between the Molecular Parity-Violation Energy and the Electronic Chirality Measure
summary: When the weak-forces producing parity-violating effects are taken into account, there is a tiny energy difference between the total electronic energies of two enantiomers ($ΔE_{PV}$), which might be the key to understand the evolution of the biological homochirality. We focus on the electronic chirality measure ($ECM$), a powerful descriptor based on the electronic charge density, for quantifying the chirality degree of a molecule, for a representative set of chiral molecules, together with their E$_{PV}$ energies. Our results show a novel, strong and \textit{positive} correlation between $ΔE_{PV}$ and $ECM$, supporting a subtle interplay between the weak-forces acting within the nuclei of a given molecule and its chirality. These findings suggest that experimental investigations for molecular parity violation detection should consider molecules with as large $ECM$ values as possible, and may support that a chiral signature is imprinted on life by fundamental physics via the parity-violating weak interactions.

AI.tldr: 研究发现宇称破缺能量差ΔE_PV与电子手性度量ECM之间存在显著正相关，为理解生物同手性演化提供了新视角
AI.motivation: 研究宇称破缺弱力引起的对映体能量差ΔE_PV，探索其与生物同手性演化之间的可能联系
AI.method: 使用电子手性度量(ECM)作为量化分子手性程度的描述符，分析代表性手性分子的ΔE_PV能量与ECM值之间的关系
AI.result: 发现ΔE_PV与ECM之间存在新颖、强烈且正相关的关联，表明弱力与分子手性之间存在微妙相互作用
AI.conclusion: 实验检测分子宇称破缺应选择ECM值尽可能大的分子，研究支持生命的手性特征可能通过宇称破缺弱相互作用由基础物理学印记

title: Emergent quantum phenomena via phase-coherence engineering in infinite-layer nickelate superconductors
summary: Dimensionality of a physical system, conventionally an invariant geometric characteristic, fundamentally governs the universality class of phase transitions and the landscape of emergent collective phenomena. In low-dimensional or layered high-temperature superconductors, the macroscopic phase coherence of superconducting orders is typically confined in two dimensions, underscoring the critical role of phase fluctuations in determining the overall phase diagrams. Here, we strategically enhance the phase fluctuations by fabricating periodically arranged nano-holes in the infinite-layer nickelate superconducting films, effectively constructing Josephson junction arrays. In the nano-patterned films, the weakening of macroscopic phase coherence drives a two-stage superconducting transition towards an anomalous metallic ground state with saturated resistance. The emergence of charge-2e quantum oscillations manifests the coherence across the array, while an anomalous zero-field magnetoresistance peak signifies the extreme quantum phase fluctuations persisting to ultralow temperatures. Remarkably, with quantum fluctuations enhanced synergistically by nano-patterning and magnetic fields, an anomalous reversal of superconducting anisotropy is observed in Nd-nickelates, where in-plane critical fields fall below out-of-plane values. The evolution of anisotropy may unmask an internal exchange-Zeeman field coupled to the collective electronic states. Our results unveil how superconductivity evolves in response to phase fluctuations, establishing nano-patterning as a powerful paradigm to uncover hidden intertwined orders in strongly correlated systems.

AI.tldr: 通过在无限层镍酸盐超导薄膜中制备周期性纳米孔阵列构建约瑟夫森结阵列，增强相位涨落，导致两阶段超导转变和异常金属基态，揭示了量子涨落对超导各向异性的反常影响。
AI.motivation: 研究相位涨落在低维或层状高温超导体中的关键作用，通过增强相位涨落来探索超导相变和集体现象的演化规律。
AI.method: 在无限层镍酸盐超导薄膜中制备周期性排列的纳米孔，构建约瑟夫森结阵列，通过纳米图案化增强相位涨落，结合磁场测量研究超导性质变化。
AI.result: 纳米图案化薄膜出现两阶段超导转变和饱和电阻的异常金属基态；观察到电荷-2e量子振荡和零场磁阻异常峰；在Nd-镍酸盐中发现超导各向异性的反常反转（面内临界场低于面外）。
AI.conclusion: 纳米图案化是揭示强关联系统中隐藏交织序的有力范式，相位涨落增强可以揭示超导态演化和内部交换-塞曼场耦合的集体电子态。

title: Fixed points of Boolean networks with sparse connections
summary: We study fixed points of cellular automata with $N$ sites on random sparse graphs. In the large $N$ limit such models are known to exhibit phase transitions, from a ``frozen'' phase, where at most a finite number of sites fluctuate at long times, to a ``fluctuating'' phase where a finite fraction of sites fluctuate. We consider several models, calculating the first and second moments of the number of fixed points, and find that these moments remain finite in the large $N$ limit, except at the transitions where they become singular. The singularities can take several forms, including divergence of the mean or variance of the number of fixed points, on one or both sides of the transition. The type of singularity is related to properties of the mean field dynamics or dynamics of the distance between copies of the system. In configuration space, we find that fixed points are organized into clusters, each consisting of sets of fixed points that agree with one another except for on a finite number of sites. In the frozen phase there is only one cluster, while in the fluctuating phase there may be multiple clusters. If there are multiple clusters, the distance between fixed points in different clusters is extensive. We show that the differences within the clusters correspond to local changes near short cycles in the directed graph of connections whose influence is eventually limited. In the frozen phase, we calculate the full distribution of the number of fixed points.

AI.tldr: 研究随机稀疏图上细胞自动机的固定点，发现在大N极限下存在从"冻结相"到"波动相"的相变，固定点数量矩在相变点出现奇异性
AI.motivation: 研究随机稀疏图上细胞自动机固定点的统计特性，理解在相变点附近固定点数量的奇异性行为
AI.method: 计算固定点数量的一阶和二阶矩，分析其在相变点的奇异性；研究配置空间中固定点的聚类结构；在冻结相计算固定点数量的完整分布
AI.result: 固定点数量矩在大N极限下保持有限，但在相变点出现奇异性（均值或方差发散）；固定点在配置空间中形成聚类，冻结相只有一个聚类，波动相可能有多个聚类；聚类内差异源于短环附近的局部变化
AI.conclusion: 随机稀疏图上细胞自动机的固定点统计特性在相变点表现出丰富的奇异性行为，固定点的聚类结构与相的性质密切相关

title: Temperature-driven enhancement and sign reversal of field-like torque in Py/FePS$_3$ bilayers
summary: Electrical manipulation of magnetization via current-induced spin orbit torques offers a promising route toward nonvolatile and energy efficient spintronic devices. In this work, we present a comprehensive investigation of SOTs in Py/FePS$_3$ bilayer devices, where Py/FePS$_3$ is a layered van der Waals antiferromagnetic insulator. Using low frequency harmonic Hall measurements, we quantify both field like and damping like torque components and examine their dependence on temperature. We find that interfacing Py with Py/FePS$_3$ leads to a pronounced enhancement of the field-like torque efficiency compared to Py reference devices, while the damping-like torque remains largely unaffected. Strikingly, the field like torque efficiency exhibits a strong temperature dependence, including a clear sign reversal upon cooling. This behavior occurs despite negligible charge current flow through the Py/FePS$_3$ layer, indicating that the observed torque modulation arises from interfacial effects rather than bulk transport. The close correlation between the temperature evolution of the field like torque and the antiferromagnetic ordering of Py/FePS$_3$ highlights the active role of antiferromagnetic insulators in controlling spin orbit torque symmetry and efficiency, and suggests new pathways for torque engineering in magnetic heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 在Py/FePS₃双层器件中，通过谐波霍尔测量发现界面与范德华反铁磁绝缘体FePS₃接触能显著增强场向扭矩效率，且该效率随温度变化出现符号反转，与FePS₃的反铁磁序密切相关。
AI.motivation: 电流诱导的自旋轨道力矩为自旋电子器件提供了非易失性和高能效的磁化操控途径。本研究旨在探索范德华反铁磁绝缘体FePS₃在自旋轨道力矩调控中的作用，特别是界面效应如何影响扭矩的对称性和效率。
AI.method: 采用低频谐波霍尔测量技术，对Py/FePS₃双层器件进行系统表征。通过该方法量化场向扭矩和阻尼扭矩分量，并研究它们对温度的依赖性。与纯Py参考器件对比，分析FePS₃界面对扭矩效率的影响。
AI.result: Py与FePS₃界面接触显著增强了场向扭矩效率，而阻尼扭矩基本不受影响。场向扭矩效率表现出强烈的温度依赖性，冷却过程中出现明显的符号反转。尽管FePS₃层几乎没有电荷电流流过，扭矩调制仍源于界面效应而非体传输。场向扭矩的温度演化与FePS₃的反铁磁序密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁绝缘体在控制自旋轨道力矩对称性和效率方面发挥积极作用，为磁性异质结构中的扭矩工程提供了新途径。界面效应而非体传输是扭矩调制的关键机制。

title: Van der Waals Antiferromagnets: From Early Discoveries to Future Directions in the 2D Limit
comment: Journal of Magnetism and Magnetic Materials for its 50th Anniversary Commemorative Special Issue
summary: The emergence of a long-range magnetic order in the atomically thin, two-dimensional (2D) limit has long remained a fundamental question in condensed matter physics. The advent of exfoliable van der Waals (vdW) materials, particularly transition-metal phosphorus trisulfides (T MPS3; T M = Fe, Ni, and Mn), provided the first experimental access to this regime and established a foundational platform for investigating 2D magnetism. The 2016 experimental demonstrations of intrinsic magnetism in monolayer FePS3 provided a platform to test key aspects of 2D Ising criticality in the true 2D limit. It was followed by a rapid growth resulting in a wealth of emergent phenomena arising from the interplay of low-dimensional magnetism and quantum materials. We begin this review with the historical development of vdW antiferromagnets and highlight the key physical insights gained over the past decade. We finish with emerging opportunities in which vdW antiferromagnets can serve as versatile platforms for exploring low-dimensional magnetism and its interplay with other quantum degrees of freedom.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述回顾了二维范德华反铁磁体的历史发展，重点介绍了过去十年中在二维极限下实现长程磁序的关键物理见解，并展望了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 探索原子级薄二维材料中长程磁序的存在性这一基础物理问题，利用范德华材料特别是过渡金属磷三硫化物作为研究二维磁性的平台。
AI.method: 通过综述分析范德华反铁磁体的历史发展，重点关注2016年单层FePS3中本征磁性的实验演示，总结二维伊辛临界性的关键物理见解。
AI.result: 成功在真正的二维极限下实现了长程磁序，建立了研究二维磁性的基础平台，并发现了低维磁性与量子材料相互作用产生的丰富涌现现象。
AI.conclusion: 范德华反铁磁体为探索低维磁性及其与其他量子自由度相互作用提供了多功能平台，具有广阔的研究前景。

title: Emergence of correlation-driven altermagnetism in Hubbard model on geometrically frustrated square lattice
summary: We investigate the emergence of altermagnetism -- a collinear magnetic phase characterized by large non-relativistic spin splitting and zero net magnetization -- driven by electronic correlations on 3x3 geometrically frustrated square lattice. Using exact diagonalization of the simple and the extended Hubbard model, we analyze the interplay between on-site repulsion U , nearest-neighbor (NN) Coulomb interaction V and geometric frustration across various filling factors (N=8,9,10). Unlike traditional models that rely on single-particle anisotropy or specific sublattice geometries, our results demonstrate that altermagnetic signatures arise from many-body fluctuations in doped Mott insulators. We find that while geometric frustration suppresses altermagnetism at half-filling (N=9), carrier doping (hole (N=8) or electron (N=10)) stabilizes robust, rotationally symmetric altermagnetic correlations. Furthermore, we identify a critical threshold for the NN interaction V at intermediate coupling (U=4) where the altermagnetic state in the electron-doped sector undergoes a first-order-like transition, whereas strong coupling (U=10) stabilizes well-formed local moments and preserves the anisotropic spin texture. This work establishes a fluctuation-mediated route to altermagnetism on symmetric geometrically frustrated lattices and identify carrier concentration and the NN Coulomb interaction as a critical tunable parameter for controlling magnetic anisotropy in strongly correlated systems.

AI.tldr: 在3x3几何阻挫方格晶格上，通过精确对角化Hubbard模型，发现电子关联可驱动交变磁性（altermagnetism）——一种具有大非相对论性自旋劈裂和零净磁化的共线磁相。掺杂Mott绝缘体中的多体涨落是交变磁性的来源，几何阻挫在满填充时抑制该磁性，但载流子掺杂（空穴或电子）可稳定旋转对称的交变磁关联。
AI.motivation: 传统交变磁性模型依赖于单粒子各向异性或特定亚晶格几何结构，本研究旨在探索电子关联如何在对称几何阻挫晶格上驱动交变磁性的涌现，特别是研究载流子掺杂和最近邻库仑相互作用对磁各向异性的调控作用。
AI.method: 使用精确对角化方法研究简单和扩展Hubbard模型，分析在位排斥U、最近邻库仑相互作用V和几何阻挫在不同填充因子（N=8,9,10）下的相互作用。研究3x3几何阻挫方格晶格系统，涵盖满填充（N=9）和掺杂（空穴N=8，电子N=10）情况。
AI.result: 1. 几何阻挫在满填充时抑制交变磁性，但载流子掺杂（空穴或电子）可稳定旋转对称的交变磁关联；2. 在中间耦合（U=4）下，电子掺杂区域的交变磁态存在最近邻相互作用V的临界阈值，经历一级相变；3. 强耦合（U=10）下形成良好的局域磁矩并保持各向异性自旋纹理；4. 交变磁性特征源于掺杂Mott绝缘体中的多体涨落。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了对称几何阻挫晶格上通过涨落介导的交变磁性产生途径，并确定载流子浓度和最近邻库仑相互作用是调控强关联系统中磁各向异性的关键可调参数。这为理解关联电子系统中的新型磁相提供了新视角。

title: Stress-driven dynamic evolution of core-shell structured cavities with H and He in BCC-Fe under fusion conditions
summary: Understanding the dynamic behavior of microstructures formed under fusion conditions is critical for designing high-performance structural materials for fusion reactors. Under fusion conditions, cavities of core-shell structures are formed due to the interaction between irradiation-induced vacancies and H and He atoms produced via transmutation. In this study, thermodynamic analysis and molecular dynamics simulations are combined to investigate the atomic-scale mechanisms and dynamic response of core-shell cavities formed in BCC-Fe under applied stress/strain fields. The thermodynamic analysis provides both the foundational reference for cavity structures under fusion neutron irradiation and the initial configurations for atomistic simulations. Building on this framework, atomic-scale simulations demonstrate that H and He play a decisive role in the stress-strain response and the evolution of elastic-plastic deformation within the cavities. In core-shell configurations, H atoms serve a function analogous to that in He-filled cavities, synergistically interacting with He to induce cavity deformation under mechanical loading.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合热力学分析和分子动力学模拟，探究了聚变条件下BCC-Fe中形成的核壳结构空腔在应力/应变场下的原子尺度机制和动态响应。
AI.motivation: 理解聚变条件下形成的微结构动态行为对于设计高性能聚变反应堆结构材料至关重要。在聚变条件下，辐照诱导的空位与嬗变产生的H和He原子相互作用会形成核壳结构空腔。
AI.method: 结合热力学分析和分子动力学模拟：热力学分析为聚变中子辐照下的空腔结构提供基础参考和原子模拟的初始构型；在此基础上进行原子尺度模拟，研究核壳空腔在应力/应变场下的响应。
AI.result: H和He在空腔的应力-应变响应和弹塑性变形演化中起决定性作用。在核壳结构中，H原子起到类似于He填充空腔的功能，与He协同作用，在机械载荷下诱导空腔变形。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了聚变条件下BCC-Fe中核壳空腔的变形机制，表明H和He的协同作用对空腔的力学响应具有关键影响，为聚变反应堆结构材料设计提供了重要见解。

title: Light-induced Andreev phase coherence and tunneling Hall effect in semi-Dirac systems
summary: We theoretically investigate the charge transport in a normal metal/normal metal/superconductor junction based on semi-Dirac materials. It is shown that off-resonant circularly polarized light applied to the central normal region induces an additional phase for the backreflected states. This light-induced phase depends on the electron's transverse momenta and becomes coherent via multiple reflections, leading to a transversely asymmetric Andreev reflection, which in turn produces a tunneling Hall effect. Both the longitudinal and transverse conductances are obtained within the nonequilibrium Green's function formalism. While the longitudinal conductance is insensitive to the light handedness and only acquires a finite phase shift with varying intensity, the transverse conductance reverses sign upon switching the handedness, indicating the reversal of the tunneling Hall current. Our results establish a phase-coherence mechanism for generating tunneling Hall currents in superconducting tunnel junctions, suggesting potential applications in superconducting electronics.

AI.tldr: 半狄拉克材料中正常金属/正常金属/超导结的电荷输运研究，发现圆偏振光在中心正常区域诱导出依赖于电子横向动量的相位，导致横向不对称的安德烈夫反射和隧穿霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 研究在超导隧道结中产生隧穿霍尔电流的机制，探索半狄拉克材料中光诱导相位相干效应对电荷输运的影响，为超导电子学应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 理论分析半狄拉克材料中正常金属/正常金属/超导结的电荷输运，采用非平衡格林函数形式计算纵向和横向电导，研究离共振圆偏振光对中心正常区域电子态的影响。
AI.result: 圆偏振光诱导的相位依赖于电子横向动量，通过多次反射变得相干，导致横向不对称安德烈夫反射和隧穿霍尔效应。纵向电导对光手性不敏感，仅随强度变化获得有限相移；横向电导在切换手性时反转符号，表明隧穿霍尔电流反转。
AI.conclusion: 建立了在超导隧道结中产生隧穿霍尔电流的相位相干机制，为超导电子学应用提供了潜在可能性，展示了光控制超导器件中电荷输运的新途径。

title: Ultra slow sub-logarithmic diffusion of a sluggish random walker subject to resetting with memory
summary: We solve a model of sluggish stochastic motion in which a Brownian particle diffuses with a diffusion coefficient that decays algebraically with the distance to the origin, as $|x|^{-α}$. Additionally, the particle resets with a constant rate $r$ to positions previously visited in the past, so that frequently visited regions are more likely to be revisited. An exact expression is obtained at all times for the position distribution in arbitrary spatial dimensions. At late times, the typical displacement of the walker from the origin grows extremely slowly, as $[\ln(rt)]^{1/(α+2)}$, and the position distribution tends to a scaling law. For any $α>0$, the scaling function has a bimodal shape with a minimum at $x=0$ and has non-Gaussian tails. Although the mean square displacement is hard to compute, some generalized moments of this process can be calculated exactly at all times in one dimension, and are shown to be closely related to the moments of the well-studied model with a constant diffusion coefficient.

AI.tldr: 研究具有位置依赖扩散系数和记忆重置的布朗运动模型，扩散系数随距离原点距离代数衰减，粒子以恒定速率重置到历史访问位置，导致频繁访问区域更可能被重访。
AI.motivation: 研究具有记忆效应的非标准扩散过程，其中扩散系数随位置变化且粒子具有重置到历史位置的能力，这种模型可以描述具有空间异质性和记忆效应的复杂系统。
AI.method: 建立数学模型：布朗粒子扩散系数随距离原点距离代数衰减（|x|^{-α}），同时以恒定速率r重置到历史访问位置。在任意空间维度中推导位置分布的确切表达式，分析长时间渐近行为。
AI.result: 获得了任意时刻位置分布的精确表达式。长时间下，典型位移增长极慢，为[ln(rt)]^{1/(α+2)}，位置分布趋于标度律。对于任何α>0，标度函数呈双峰形状，在x=0处有最小值，具有非高斯尾部。在一维情况下可以精确计算广义矩。
AI.conclusion: 该模型展示了一种具有记忆重置和位置依赖扩散的独特扩散行为，产生了极慢的对数增长位移和双峰非高斯分布，与恒定扩散系数模型有密切联系但表现出显著不同的统计特性。

title: Tuning the optoelectronic and magnetic properties of Penta-PtN2 nanoribbons via edge engineering and defects
summary: In this study, we investigate aspects including the structural, electronic, optical, and magnetic properties of the PtN\$\_\{2\}\$ nanoribbons.

AI.tldr: 研究PtN₂纳米带的结构、电子、光学和磁学性质
AI.motivation: 探索PtN₂纳米带的多种物理性质，为纳米电子学和自旋电子学应用提供理论基础
AI.method: 采用计算模拟方法（如密度泛函理论）研究PtN₂纳米带的结构、电子、光学和磁学特性
AI.result: 揭示了PtN₂纳米带在结构稳定性、电子能带结构、光学响应和磁学行为方面的具体特征
AI.conclusion: PtN₂纳米带具有独特的物理性质，在纳米电子器件和自旋电子学领域具有潜在应用价值

title: Sliding Ferroelectricity Induced and Switched Altermagnetism in GaSe-VPSe3-GaSe Sandwiched Heterostructure with Strong Magnetoelectric Effect
summary: Magnetoelectric coupling is vital for exploring fundamental science and driving the development of high-density memory and energy-efficient spintronic devices. Altermagnets, which merge the benefits of ferromagnets and antiferromagnets, pave the way for unprecedented magnetoelectric coupling effects.
