The changes observed in the crystal structure are related to the transformation of secondary (halogen) bonds into electron-deficient multicenter bonds. The paper also discusses the effect of pressure on the compressibility of the Sr(IO3)2HIO3 crystal structure, its phonons, the electronic band gap, and the refractive index. Sr(IO3)2HIO3 was found to be highly compressible with an anisotropic compressibility. The softening of the internal I-O vibrations of IO3 units was also observed, together with a decrease of the band-gap energy (from 4.1 eV at 0 GPa to 3.7 eV at 20 GPa), a band-gap crossing, and a change in the topology of the band structure, with Sr(IO3)2HIO3 transforming from a direct gap semiconductor at 0 GPa to an indirect gap semiconductor beyond 6 GPa.

AI.tldr: 高压下Sr(IO3)2HIO3晶体结构发生两阶段变化：2.5GPa形成[HIO3]-[IO3]复合物，4.5GPa形成[HIO3]-[IO3]-[IO3]-[HIO3]二聚体，涉及碘超配位和键型转变。
AI.motivation: 研究高压下Sr(IO3)2HIO3晶体结构变化，特别关注碘原子配位变化、HIO3和IO3单元构型转变，以及次级卤素键向缺电子多中心键的转化。
AI.method: 结合实验与理论计算：同步辐射粉末X射线衍射、拉曼光谱、光学吸收实验，以及密度泛函理论计算（包括电子密度拓扑分析），压力范围达20GPa。
AI.result: 发现两阶段结构变化：2.5GPa形成[HIO3]-[IO3]复合物，4.5GPa形成二聚体；晶体高度可压缩且各向异性；观察到I-O振动软化、带隙减小（4.1eV→3.7eV）、带隙交叉，以及从直接带隙半导体（0GPa）向间接带隙半导体（>6GPa）的转变。
AI.conclusion: 高压诱导Sr(IO3)2HIO3发生显著结构重构，涉及碘超配位和键型转变，同时影响其压缩性、声子、带隙和折射率等物理性质，为理解高压下碘酸盐材料行为提供了新见解。

title: Anomalous Diffusion and Superdiffusion in Integrable Spin Chains via a Hard-Rod Gas Mapping
summary: We introduce a multi-species generalization of the hard-rod gas in which each species has a distinct effective length, and the repulsive scattering shift is set by the smaller of the two colliding rods. We argue that this model shares key quasiparticle and scattering features with the XXZ spin chain. We show that fixing only the functional decay of bare velocities with rod length is sufficient to reproduce the XXZ spin-transport phase diagram: diffusion (with anomalous fluctuations) in the anisotropic regime and superdiffusion at the isotropic point. We then demonstrate that the statistics of charge transfer differs qualitatively from that of particle trajectories. For long rods, trajectories are Gaussian in the diffusive regime and appear to exhibit KPZ statistics at the isotropic point, providing a direct microscopic signature of KPZ physics in integrable quasiparticle motion. In contrast, charge-transfer fluctuations are anomalous in the anisotropic regime, while they cross over to Gaussian statistics at late times at the isotropic point, reconciling non-Gaussian trajectory fluctuations with Gaussian charge-transfer statistics. Our results establish classical hard-rod dynamics as a minimal yet quantitatively faithful framework for anomalous spin and charge transport in integrable systems, and offer new insight into the origin of KPZ fluctuations in isotropic integrable models.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多物种硬棒气体模型，能够重现XXZ自旋链的输运相图，包括各向异性区的扩散和各向同性点的超扩散，并揭示了轨迹统计与电荷转移统计之间的重要差异。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是建立一个经典硬棒动力学模型，作为可积系统中异常自旋和电荷输运的最小化但定量准确的框架，特别是为了理解各向同性可积模型中KPZ涨落的起源。
AI.method: 引入多物种硬棒气体模型，每个物种具有不同的有效长度，排斥散射位移由两个碰撞棒中较小的一个决定。通过固定裸速度随棒长的函数衰减，重现XXZ自旋输运相图。
AI.result: 模型成功重现了XXZ自旋输运相图：各向异性区出现扩散（带有异常涨落），各向同性点出现超扩散。长棒轨迹在扩散区呈高斯统计，在各向同性点呈现KPZ统计，而电荷转移涨落在各向异性区异常，在各向同性点晚期交叉到高斯统计。
AI.conclusion: 经典硬棒动力学为可积系统中的异常自旋和电荷输运提供了一个最小化但定量准确的框架，为理解各向同性可积模型中KPZ涨落的起源提供了新见解，并揭示了轨迹统计与电荷转移统计之间的重要差异。

title: Configurational control of photon emission from a molecular dimer
summary: Tin-phthalocyanine molecules adsorbed on a NaCl ultrathin film on Au(111) exhibit electrofluorescence excited by a current across a scanning tunneling microscope junction. Exploring the dependence of the molecular monomer photon yield on the injected current evidences the one-electron excitation process underlying the neutral-exciton luminescence. Photon spectra of the monomer exhibit vibrational progression and hot luminescence, while the dimer electrofluorescence spectroscopic fine structure results from the coupling of the adjacent optical transition dipoles. The photon yield of the dimer is significantly altered upon changing the configurational state of one of the two molecules. In one of the bistable configurations light emission is amplified compared to the monomer, and it is reduced in the other.

AI.tldr: 研究通过扫描隧道显微镜在NaCl/Au(111)上观测到酞菁锡分子的电致荧光，揭示了单电子激发过程，并发现二聚体荧光受分子构型调控
AI.motivation: 探索分子尺度电致荧光现象，理解单分子和分子二聚体在扫描隧道显微镜电流激发下的发光机制和调控特性
AI.method: 使用扫描隧道显微镜在NaCl/Au(111)衬底上研究酞菁锡分子，通过电流注入激发荧光，分析光子产率与电流关系，测量单体和二聚体的光谱特征
AI.result: 单体荧光符合单电子激发过程，光谱显示振动级数和热发光；二聚体荧光精细结构源于相邻光学跃迁偶极子耦合，且荧光产率随分子构型变化显著，在双稳态构型中分别出现增强和减弱
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了分子尺度电致荧光的单电子激发机制，并展示了通过调控分子构型可以有效控制二聚体的荧光强度，为分子光电器件设计提供了新思路

title: Relationship between local hydride ion dynamics and ionic conductivity in LaH$_{3-2x}$O$_x$ inferred from muon study
summary: We performed muon spin rotation and relaxation ($μ$SR) experiments to investigate the microscopic mechanism behind the high ionic conductivity ($σ$) exhibited by hydride (H$^-$) ions in lanthanum hydroxide LaH$_{3-2x}$O$_x$. The $μ$SR spectra observed at 5--300 K in a sample with $x\approx0.25$ consist primarily of two components which are attributed to muons occupying tetrahedral (Tet) and octahedral (Oct) sites common to H$^-$. The spectra also indicate that muons at the Oct sites (Mu$_{\rm O}$) appear nearly stationary in the time scale of $μ$SR ($\sim$10$^{-5}$ s), whereas those at the Tet sites (Mu$_{\rm T}$) are subject to the fluctuating local fields. The cusp-like peak in the fluctuation rate around 160 K and the decrease in linewidth at higher temperatures probed by Mu$_{\rm T}$ suggest that the jump motion of both Mu$_{\rm T}$ (via the vacant Oct sites) and surrounding Oct-site H$^-$ contributes to spin relaxation and that the fluctuation frequency is widely distributed. These results indicate that the implanted Mu behave as Mu$^-$ and that the jump motion of Mu$^-$/H$^-$ is restricted by the availability of nearby vacant sites. On the other hand, the activation energy for the jump is estimated to be 0.11(3) eV, which is significantly different from $\sim$1.3 eV evaluated from the temperature dependence of $σ$ at high temperatures ($\gtrsim400$ K). In our attempt to resolve this discrepancy, we discuss problems inherent in interpreting $σ$ using the Arrhenius equation, and demonstrate that the behavior of H$^-$ ions can be better explained as a viscous fluid exhibiting a glass transition.

AI.tldr: 通过μSR实验研究LaH₃₋₂ₓOₓ中氢离子高离子电导率的微观机制，发现Mu⁻/H⁻跳跃运动受邻近空位限制，活化能0.11(3)eV远低于高温电导率测得的~1.3eV，表明氢离子行为更接近具有玻璃转变的粘性流体。
AI.motivation: 探究氢氧化镧LaH₃₋₂ₓOₓ中氢离子（H⁻）表现出高离子电导率的微观机制，理解其导电行为的物理本质。
AI.method: 采用μ子自旋转动和弛豫（μSR）实验技术，在5-300K温度范围内测量x≈0.25样品，分析μ子占据四面体（Tet）和八面体（Oct）位点的谱线特征，研究局部场涨落和跳跃运动。
AI.result: 1. μ子主要占据四面体和八面体位点；2. 八面体位点μ子近乎静止，四面体位点μ子受涨落局部场影响；3. 160K附近涨落率出现尖峰，高温下线宽减小；4. Mu⁻/H⁻跳跃运动受邻近空位限制；5. 跳跃活化能为0.11(3)eV，远低于高温电导率测得的~1.3eV。
AI.conclusion: 植入的μ子表现为Mu⁻，其跳跃运动受邻近空位限制。高温电导率的Arrhenius方程解释存在问题，氢离子行为更符合具有玻璃转变的粘性流体模型，这能更好地解释实验观测到的活化能差异。

title: Layer-polarized Transport via Gate-defined 1D and 0D PN Junctions in Double Bilayer Graphene
summary: We fabricate twisted double bilayer graphene devices with zero twist angle and a set of local top and bottom gates aligned perpendicularly to each other. A 1D PN junction can be electrostatically defined when the gate voltages applied to the top gates are the same but different on the bottom gates. Resistance peaks are observed at finite doping instead of at the charge neutrality points, exhibiting an unconventional broken-cross shape that arises from layer polarization of the P and N region, which can be further enhanced with finite magnetic fields. A 0D point junction (PJ) can be electrostatically defined by applying different gate voltages to the top and bottom gates, such that the P and N sides of the device are connected at a single point in the center of the device. As finite magnetic field B increases, the quantum Hall (QH) states are selectively brought into contact or away from each other depending on their layer polarization, leading to unconventional quantum oscillations which characterize the layer-polarized band-crossing. Our work provides new insights into understanding band-structure evolution and layer polarization in twisted bilayers and paves the way for new device functionality based on manipulating layer-polarized electronic states.

AI.tldr: 在零扭转角的双层石墨烯中，通过垂直排列的顶栅和底栅构建1D PN结和0D点结，观察到非常规的电阻峰和量子振荡，揭示了层极化效应及其在磁场中的增强。
AI.motivation: 研究扭曲双层石墨烯中层极化电子态的能带结构演化和操纵，为基于层极化电子态的新器件功能开发提供基础。
AI.method: 制备零扭转角的扭曲双层双层石墨烯器件，使用垂直排列的局部顶栅和底栅。通过不同的栅压配置：1）相同顶栅电压、不同底栅电压构建1D PN结；2）不同顶栅和底栅电压构建0D点结。在磁场下测量电阻和量子振荡。
AI.result: 1D PN结中观察到非常规的"破碎十字形"电阻峰，出现在有限掺杂而非电荷中性点，源于P区和N区的层极化，磁场可增强此效应。0D点结中，磁场选择性使不同层极化的量子霍尔态接触或分离，产生非常规量子振荡，表征了层极化能带交叉。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解扭曲双层中层极化能带演化提供了新见解，并为基于操纵层极化电子态的新器件功能开辟了道路。

title: On-surface synthesis and aromaticity of large cyclocarbons
summary: Molecular rings of N carbon atoms, that is, cyclo[N]carbons, or $C_N$, can be formed by tip-induced chemistry [1-7]. Because of their monocyclic geometry, cyclocarbons are fundamentally important for testing theoretical models of aromaticity [8-11]. Here, we synthesized large cyclo[N]carbons, with N up to 88, by tip-induced chemistry on a NaCl surface and studied their aromaticity by measuring their transport gaps by scanning tunnelling spectroscopy. We first generated $C_{20}$ and $C_{22}$, and then fused multiple cyclocarbons [5-7] by means of atom manipulation, obtaining $C_{42}$, $C_{44}$, $C_{46}$, $C_{66}$ and $C_{88}$. In line with theory, using a finely tuned density functional approximation [12-15], we observe a substantially smaller transport gap for $C_{20}$ (N = 4n) compared to $C_{22}$ (4n+2), and for $C_{44}$ (4n) compared to $C_{42}$ (4n+2). In larger cyclocarbons, the oscillation of the transport gap between anti-aromatic N = 4n and aromatic N = 4n+2 cyclocarbons becomes smaller, and is expected to eventually vanish with increasing N indicating non-aromaticity. Our experimental results show that aromaticity persists at N = 42, and theory predicts ring currents comparable in magnitude to that of benzene in cyclocarbons of this size. In the future, large cyclocarbons could be used as model systems to study conductance, quantum interference, and the effects of aromaticity in single atomic carbon wires and circuits.

AI.tldr: 通过尖端诱导化学在NaCl表面合成了大尺寸环碳分子（N最大达88），并测量其输运能隙研究芳香性，发现4n和4n+2环碳的芳香性差异随尺寸增大而减小
AI.motivation: 环碳分子因其单环几何结构对测试芳香性理论模型具有根本重要性，需要实验验证大尺寸环碳的芳香性变化规律
AI.method: 在NaCl表面通过尖端诱导化学合成环碳分子（C20至C88），利用扫描隧道光谱测量输运能隙，结合精细调谐的密度泛函理论计算
AI.result: C20（4n）比C22（4n+2）输运能隙显著更小，C44（4n）比C42（4n+2）更小；大尺寸环碳中芳香性与反芳香性能隙振荡减弱，N=42时芳香性仍存在且理论预测环电流强度与苯相当
AI.conclusion: 大尺寸环碳可作为研究单原子碳导线和电路中电导、量子干涉及芳香性效应的模型系统，芳香性随尺寸增大逐渐消失

title: Experimental Powder X-ray Diffraction Crystal Structure Determination with RealPXRD-Solver
summary: Determining crystal structures from experimental powder X-ray diffraction data remains challenging because peak overlap, preferred orientation, and impurity phases obscure atomic arrangements. We present RealPXRD-Solver, a generative model trained on 6,250,238 theoretical structures with experiment-mimicking augmentations and a universal encoder of d-spacing--intensity fingerprints, enabling both lattice-conditioned and lattice-free inference. RealPXRD-Solver reaches a 98.3% Top-20 match rate on a 10,000-structure theoretical benchmark and achieves Top-1/Top-20 accuracies of 77.9%/91.9% on CNRS and 78.8%/92.9% on RRUFF experimental datasets, and it solved 39 previously unreported Powder Diffraction File entries.

AI.tldr: RealPXRD-Solver：基于生成模型，通过实验模拟增强和通用d间距-强度指纹编码器，从粉末X射线衍射数据中确定晶体结构
AI.motivation: 从实验粉末X射线衍射数据确定晶体结构仍然具有挑战性，因为峰重叠、择优取向和杂质相会掩盖原子排列
AI.method: 使用6,250,238个理论结构进行训练，采用实验模拟增强技术和通用d间距-强度指纹编码器，支持晶格条件推断和无晶格推断
AI.result: 在10,000个结构的理论基准测试中达到98.3%的Top-20匹配率；在CNRS和RRUFF实验数据集上分别达到77.9%/91.9%和78.8%/92.9%的Top-1/Top-20准确率；解决了39个先前未报告的粉末衍射文件条目
AI.conclusion: RealPXRD-Solver能够有效解决从粉末X射线衍射数据确定晶体结构的挑战，在理论和实验数据集上都表现出色

title: Unfolding Bloch States in Disordered Systems
summary: In crystalline solids, disorder breaks translational symmetry and obscures k-resolved Bloch states, limiting an accurate description of wavefunction-based observables. In this work, we present a method that unfolds not only the band structures but also the corresponding Bloch states in disordered systems, going beyond conventional band-unfolding techniques. As a prototype application, we study defective graphene and demonstrate the capabilities by capturing key wavefunction-level responses, including disorder-driven redistribution of Berry curvature.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新方法，不仅能展开无序系统的能带结构，还能展开对应的布洛赫态，超越传统能带展开技术
AI.motivation: 晶体固体中的无序会破坏平移对称性，使k分辨的布洛赫态变得模糊，限制了基于波函数的可观测量的准确描述
AI.method: 提出一种方法，能够展开无序系统的能带结构和对应的布洛赫态，超越传统的能带展开技术
AI.result: 以缺陷石墨烯为原型应用，展示了该方法能够捕捉关键的波函数级响应，包括无序驱动的贝里曲率重新分布
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无序系统中波函数级可观测量的准确描述提供了新途径，超越了传统能带展开技术的局限性

title: Scalable tight-binding model for strained graphene
summary: We generalize the scalable tight-binding model for graphene, which allows for efficient quantum transport simulations in the Dirac regime, to account for elastic strain. We show that the original scalable model with scaling factor $s$ is readily applicable to strained graphene, provided that the displacement fields corresponding to the deformed graphene lattice are properly scaled. In particular, we show that the long-wavelength theory remains invariant when the strain tensor is scaled by $s$. This is achieved in practice by scaling the in-plane displacement fields by $s$ while the out-of-plane displacements have to be scaled by $\sqrt{s}$. We confirm these scaling laws by extensive numerical simulations, starting with the pseudomagnetic field and the local density of states for different scaled lattices. The latter allows us to study pseudo-Landau levels as well as hybrid Landau levels in the presence of an external magnetic field. Finally, we consider quantum transport simulations motivated by a recent experiment, where a uniaxial strain barrier is engineered in monolayer graphene by vertically misaligned gates. Our work generalizes the scalable tight-binding model to allow for efficient modeling of quantum transport in large-scale strained graphene devices.

AI.tldr: 将石墨烯的可扩展紧束缚模型推广到包含弹性应变，证明了应变张量缩放规律，并验证了应变诱导赝磁场和量子输运模拟
AI.motivation: 现有的可扩展紧束缚模型适用于狄拉克区量子输运模拟，但未考虑弹性应变。需要将模型推广到包含应变的情况，以高效模拟大规模应变石墨烯器件中的量子输运
AI.method: 将原始可扩展模型（缩放因子s）推广到应变石墨烯，通过适当缩放变形石墨烯晶格的位移场来实现。具体而言，面内位移场缩放s倍，面外位移缩放√s倍，使长波长理论在应变张量缩放s倍时保持不变
AI.result: 通过广泛的数值模拟验证了缩放规律：1）不同缩放晶格的赝磁场和局域态密度；2）赝朗道能级和外部磁场下的混合朗道能级；3）受实验启发的单轴应变势垒量子输运模拟，该实验通过垂直错位栅极在单层石墨烯中工程化应变势垒
AI.conclusion: 成功将可扩展紧束缚模型推广到包含弹性应变的情况，为大规模应变石墨烯器件中的高效量子输运建模提供了理论基础和数值验证

title: Nanoscale imaging reveals critical plating and stripping mechanisms in anode-free lithium and sodium solid-state batteries
summary: Achieving reversible anode-free solid-state batteries hinges on controlling alkali-metal plating and stripping at buried interfaces, yet the underlying nanoscale mechanisms remain unresolved. Here we introduce virtual-electrode low-energy electron microscopy (VE-LEEM), an imaging platform that enables nanoscale visualization of anode formation and dissolution by combining electron beam-induced plating with ultraviolet-driven stripping. By integrating VE LEEM with synchrotron-based photoemission electron microscopy and atomic force microscopy, we track the chemical and morphological evolution of Li and Na anodes during cycling. We uncover a shared dynamic scaling regime governing anode growth, analogous to high mobility thin film deposition, but emerging through distinct morphological pathways dictated by metal-specific surface energetics. This universal scaling behaviour establishes a transferable quantitative framework for comparing anode-free plating across chemistries. In contrast, stripping proceeds through sequential grain-boundary unzipping and cluster decay mechanisms, demonstrating that dissolution is intrinsically asymmetric with respect to plating and leaves behind a persistent interfacial residual layer. These results overturn the common assumption of mirrored plating-stripping dynamics and identify interfacial and grain boundary energetics as fundamental constraints on reversibility. VE LEEM thus provides a general route to resolve buried electrochemical interfaces at the nanoscale and establishes an energetic framework to guide the design of durable, high energy anode free solid state batteries.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了虚拟电极低能电子显微镜（VE-LEEM）平台，首次实现了固态电池中碱金属阳极形成与溶解过程的纳米尺度可视化，揭示了阳极生长与溶解的不对称动力学机制。
AI.motivation: 可逆的无阳极固态电池的实现依赖于对埋藏界面处碱金属电镀和剥离的控制，但相关的纳米尺度机制尚未明确。传统方法难以直接观察这些埋藏电化学界面的动态过程。
AI.method: 开发了虚拟电极低能电子显微镜（VE-LEEM）成像平台，结合电子束诱导电镀和紫外光驱动剥离技术。同时整合同步辐射光电子能谱显微镜和原子力显微镜，追踪锂和钠阳极在循环过程中的化学和形态演化。
AI.result: 发现了阳极生长遵循与高迁移率薄膜沉积类似的动态标度规律，但通过金属特异性表面能决定的独特形态路径实现。剥离过程则通过顺序晶界解链和团簇衰变机制进行，与电镀过程存在本质不对称性，并留下持久的界面残留层。
AI.conclusion: 研究推翻了电镀-剥离动力学镜像对称的常见假设，确定界面和晶界能是影响可逆性的基本约束因素。VE-LEEM为解析纳米尺度埋藏电化学界面提供了通用方法，并建立了指导设计耐用、高能量无阳极固态电池的能学框架。

title: Controlling Terahertz Spintronic Photocurrents in 2D-Semiconductor|Ferromagnet Heterostructures through a Functional Hybrid Interface
summary: A profound understanding of terahertz (THz) spin and charge currents in heterostructures involving ferromagnets (FMs) and two-dimensional (2D) materials promises emerging applications in high-speed sensing and data processing. Yet, ultrafast experimental insights remain very limited. Here, we study the efficient photo-generation of THz spin and charge currents in bilayers made from the transition-metal dichalcogenide (TMD) MoS2 and the FM Co. We find that the efficiency of current generation strongly depends on the pump photon energy, as previously reported. Surprisingly, however, we observe that the current dynamics remain identical for pump photon energies above and below the MoS2 band gap. Supported by ab-initio calculations, we conclude that an interfacial hybrid metallic layer forms at the MoS2/Co boundary that has a pronounced photon-energy-dependent absorptance. Thus, the hybrid interfacial layer effectively acts like a pump-energy transducer that increases the spin-current generated in the nearby Co. Our results uncover the vital role of interfacial hybridization as a yet unexplored mechanism for efficient generation of ultrafast photocurrents in 2D-TMD|FM structures.

AI.tldr: 研究发现MoS2/Co异质结构中存在界面杂化金属层，该层作为泵浦能量转换器，显著影响太赫兹自旋和电荷电流的生成效率。
AI.motivation: 理解铁磁体与二维材料异质结构中的太赫兹自旋和电荷电流对于高速传感和数据处理应用至关重要，但目前超快实验研究非常有限。
AI.method: 研究MoS2/Co双层结构中太赫兹自旋和电荷电流的光生过程，结合ab-initio计算分析界面特性。
AI.result: 发现电流生成效率强烈依赖于泵浦光子能量，但电流动力学在MoS2带隙上下保持相同；界面形成杂化金属层，其吸收率具有显著的光子能量依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 界面杂化作为未探索的机制，在2D-TMD|FM结构中高效生成超快光电流中起着至关重要的作用。

title: Symmetry-Indicated Time-Reversal-Doubled Axion Insulators
summary: The axion insulator exhibits a topological magnetoelectric effect characterized by an axion angle $θ=π$, while the time-reversal-doubled axion insulator (T-DAXI) can be viewed as two copies of an axion insulator related by time-reversal symmetry. In this work, we show that a topological crystalline insulator with nonsymmorphic glide or screw symmetry hosts the T-DAXI phase. The spin-resolved topology of the T-DAXI phase is guaranteed by the nonsymmorphic symmetry invariant $δ_g=1$ or $δ_s=1$ in certain spin directions. In this phase, the partial axion angles are quantized to $π$, and the gapped surfaces realize half-quantized quantum spin Hall states. By applying an external magnetic field along the $z$ direction, electrons with opposite spins accumulate on opposite $(001)$ surfaces, producing a topological spin polarization in real space. When the magnetic field is time-periodic, this leads to an alternating spin current detectable in experiment. Using $\mathrm{\textit{ab initio}}$ calculations, we demonstrate that mixed bismuth monohalides Bi4Br3I and Bi4BrI3 realize the nonsymmorphic T-DAXI with $δ_g=δ_s=1$. Our findings not only reveal the symmetry-enforced T-DAXIs in nonsymmorphic topological crystalline insulators, but also introduce the spin magnetoelectric effect as a novel topological spin response.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现非对称性拓扑晶体绝缘体可实现时间反演双轴子绝缘体(T-DAXI)相，具有量子化的部分轴子角和半量子化量子自旋霍尔表面态，在磁场下产生拓扑自旋极化和可检测的交变自旋电流。
AI.motivation: 研究非对称性拓扑晶体绝缘体中时间反演双轴子绝缘体(T-DAXI)相的存在及其独特的拓扑性质，探索新的拓扑自旋响应现象。
AI.method: 利用非对称性滑移或螺旋对称性分析拓扑晶体绝缘体，通过非对称性不变量δ_g=1或δ_s=1保证T-DAXI相的自旋分辨拓扑性质，结合第一性原理计算验证Bi4Br3I和Bi4BrI3材料实现该相。
AI.result: 发现非对称性拓扑晶体绝缘体可实现T-DAXI相，部分轴子角量子化为π，表面呈现半量子化量子自旋霍尔态，在z方向磁场下产生拓扑自旋极化和交变自旋电流，Bi4Br3I和Bi4BrI3材料证实了该相的存在。
AI.conclusion: 非对称性拓扑晶体绝缘体可实现对称性强制的时间反演双轴子绝缘体相，并引入拓扑自旋磁电效应作为新的拓扑自旋响应机制，为拓扑材料研究开辟了新方向。

title: Design of 2D V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>n</sub>Se<sub>6-n</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub> (n=0, 2, 3, 5) with multilayer kagome lattice and ultrahigh electron mobility
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) kagome materials have attracted considerable attention due to their unique electronic properties. Based on first-principles calculations and employing the "1+3" design strategy, we designed a class of composition-tunable 2D multilayer kagome materials, V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>n</sub>Se<sub>6-n</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>, and identified four stable structures: V<sub>6</sub>Se<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>, V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>2</sub>Se<sub>4</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>, V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>3</sub>Se<sub>3</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>, and V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>5</sub>Se<sub>1</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>. 2D V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>n</sub>Se<sub>6-n</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub> possesses three kagome layers, two of which are vanadium-based kagome layers, and the other is a sulfur or selenium atomic layer. Electronic structure analysis reveals that 2D V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>n</sub>Se<sub>6-n</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub> is a narrow direct-bandgap semiconductor with a bandgap ranging from 0.568 to 0.742 eV, and exhibits ultrahigh electron mobility up to 4*10<sup>4</sup> cm<sup>2</sup>V<sup>-1</sup>s<sup>-1</sup> . Orbital analysis further demonstrates that the bands contributed by the V-based kagome layers form flat bands and Dirac cones below the Fermi level, and show a relatively high Fermi velocity. In summary, 2D V<sub>6</sub>S<sub>n</sub>Se<sub>6-n</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub> provides an excellent platform for kagome physics research and the fabrication of nanoelectronic devices, adaptable to various device scenarios.

AI.tldr: 基于第一性原理计算，采用"1+3"设计策略，设计了一类成分可调的二维多层kagome材料V₆SₙSe₆₋ₙCl₆，发现四种稳定结构，具有窄直接带隙和高电子迁移率特性。
AI.motivation: 二维kagome材料因其独特的电子性质受到广泛关注，但需要设计新型可调谐的kagome材料平台来深入研究kagome物理和纳米电子器件应用。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算和"1+3"设计策略，设计并筛选出稳定的二维多层kagome材料V₆SₙSe₆₋ₙCl₆，通过电子结构分析和轨道分析研究其性质。
AI.result: 确定了四种稳定结构：V₆Se₆Cl₆、V₆S₂Se₄Cl₆、V₆S₃Se₃Cl₆和V₆S₅Se₁Cl₆。这些材料是窄直接带隙半导体（0.568-0.742 eV），具有超高电子迁移率（高达4×10⁴ cm²V⁻¹s⁻¹），V基kagome层贡献的能带形成平带和狄拉克锥。
AI.conclusion: 二维V₆SₙSe₆₋ₙCl₆为kagome物理研究和纳米电子器件制造提供了优秀平台，可适应多种器件应用场景。

title: Non-collinear Altermagnetic Phases in the Mott Insulator NiS$_2$
summary: Altermagnets (A$\ell$Ms) constitute a novel family of magnetic materials characterized by the absence of net magnetization and the presence of spin-polarized band structures. Whereas A$\ell$M phases were initially proposed in collinear structures, the recently discovered noncollinear chiral A$\ell$Ms stand out for their distinct hedgehog spin texture and multifunctionality in spintronics. In this work, we deepen the characterization of these systems by constructing a Landau theory for noncollinear achiral A$\ell$Ms. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the achiral symmetry of the crystal is reflected in the spin texture in reciprocal space, which presents only spatial-even multipoles. These multipoles, distinguished from those in collinear A$\ell$Ms via the high-order secondary order parameters, can couple to many phenomena such as the spin Hall effect and piezomagnetic effect. To exemplify our theory, we study the noncollinear achiral magnet NiS$_2$ within the framework of altermagnetism, showcasing both spin Hall and piezomagnetic effects in a prototypical correlated Mott insulator that provides an ideal platform to explore the interplay between strong electronic correlations, crystal symmetry, and altermagnetic spin textures. Interestingly, altermagnetism emerges in two magnetic ordered phases of NiS$_2$ upon lowering the temperature. The non-collinearity strengthens the robustness of A$\ell$M order, as the anti-ferromagnetism induced by the strong correlations will not impose effective time-reversal symmetry as in the collinear case. Our results suggest non-collinear achiral A$\ell$Ms as a promising platform for spintronics applications due to the potential to achieve various spin textures with different magnetic orders.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了非共线非手性反铁磁体的朗道理论，揭示了其倒空间自旋纹理的对称性特征，并以NiS₂为例展示了自旋霍尔效应和压磁效应。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体是一类新型磁性材料，具有零净磁化和自旋极化能带结构。虽然最初在共线结构中提出，但最近发现的非共线手性反铁磁体因其独特的刺猬自旋纹理和自旋电子学多功能性而备受关注。本研究旨在深入表征非共线非手性反铁磁体系统。
AI.method: 构建了非共线非手性反铁磁体的朗道理论，证明晶体非手性对称性反映在倒空间自旋纹理中，呈现仅空间偶极多极子。这些多极子通过高阶次级序参数与共线反铁磁体区分，并能耦合到自旋霍尔效应和压磁效应等现象。以NiS₂为例，在反铁磁性框架内进行研究。
AI.result: 非共线非手性反铁磁体的自旋纹理在倒空间中仅呈现空间偶极多极子，这些多极子能够耦合到自旋霍尔效应和压磁效应。在NiS₂中，降低温度时在两个磁有序相中出现了反铁磁性。非共线性增强了反铁磁序的鲁棒性，因为强关联诱导的反铁磁性不会像共线情况那样施加有效时间反演对称性。
AI.conclusion: 非共线非手性反铁磁体由于能够实现不同磁序的各种自旋纹理，成为自旋电子学应用的有前景平台。NiS₂作为典型的强关联Mott绝缘体，为探索强电子关联、晶体对称性和反铁磁自旋纹理之间的相互作用提供了理想平台。

title: Networking Molecular Quantum Emitters on a Single Chain : From Single to Cooperative Emitters
summary: Engineering light-matter interactions between multiple free-space quantum emitters is a central challenge for scalable quantum photonic technologies. In particular, accessing regimes of coherent emitter-emitter interactions, where several emitters are coupled through a shared electromagnetic environment, is essential for coherent emission and quantum functionalities. Such interactions require precise control over emitter separation and stabilization at sub-wavelength distances, a level of spatial organization that remains extremely difficult to achieve at the molecular scale in solid-state systems. Here we introduce Encoded Quantum Chains (EQC), a one-dimensional architecture in which cooperative radiative behaviour is programmed through spatial encoding of identical molecular emitters. Organic emitters and inert spacer molecules are co-encapsulated inside dielectric boron nitride nanotubes (BNNTs), enabling statistical control of intermolecular spacing from nanometres to micrometres while enforcing dipole alignment and one-dimensional confinement. Time-resolved fluorescence under ambient conditions reveals accelerated radiative decay, enhanced emission rates per emitter, and the emergence of non-mono-exponential dynamics as spacing falls below the optical wavelength, consistent with cooperative radiative states in one dimension. Bundling of EQCs enables coupling between emitters in neighbouring BNNTs, driving a dimensional crossover toward higher-dimensional delocalisation of the excitation. This modular building-block approach provides a scalable route to engineer light-matter interactions and many-body optical phenomena in confined molecular systems, opening new opportunities for distributed single-photon sources, programmable quantum emitters, and photonic architectures for quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种编码量子链（EQC）架构，通过将有机发射体和惰性间隔分子共封装在氮化硼纳米管中，实现分子间距的统计控制，从而在环境条件下观察到加速辐射衰变、增强发射速率和一维合作辐射态。
AI.motivation: 实现多个自由空间量子发射体之间的相干光-物质相互作用是扩展量子光子技术的关键挑战。特别是需要精确控制发射体间距在亚波长尺度，这在固态系统的分子尺度上极其困难。
AI.method: 引入编码量子链（EQC）一维架构：将有机发射体和惰性间隔分子共封装在介电氮化硼纳米管（BNNTs）中，通过统计控制实现从纳米到微米的分子间距，同时强制偶极子对齐和一维限制。
AI.result: 在环境条件下，时间分辨荧光显示：当间距低于光学波长时，出现加速辐射衰变、增强的每个发射体发射速率，以及非单指数动力学，与一维合作辐射态一致。EQC束的耦合实现了相邻BNNTs中发射体之间的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 这种模块化构建块方法为在受限分子系统中工程化光-物质相互作用和多体光学现象提供了可扩展途径，为分布式单光子源、可编程量子发射体和量子技术的光子架构开辟了新机会。

title: The completed High-Low framework for interface state density analysis in MOS capacitors
summary: Interface state densities, $D_{IT}$, in metal-oxide-semiconductor (MOS) capacitors are rarely reported in the accumulation energy range. It is recognized that the determination of $D_{IT}$ in accumulation is fundamentally obscured by small inaccuracies in the user-defined oxide capacitance, $C_{OX}$. This source of error prevents the High-Low frequency technique from reporting accumulation $D_{IT}$, even for sufficiently fast high-frequency measurements. To resolve this, an electrostatic constraint that is uniquely satisfied by a physically consistent $C_{OX}$ is derived from the established theory, thereby completing the High-Low framework. The theoretical validity of the completed framework is confirmed using simulated capacitance data for an n-SiC MOS structure, and the frequency limitations are demonstrated. This analytical advancement ensures a physically consistent extraction of $D_{IT}$ near the band edge, overcoming a fundamental limitation in MOS capacitor characterization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种改进的高-低频技术，通过推导物理一致的氧化层电容约束条件，解决了MOS电容积累区界面态密度测量的基本限制。
AI.motivation: 传统高-低频技术在MOS电容积累区测量界面态密度时存在根本性限制，主要原因是用户定义的氧化层电容微小误差会完全掩盖积累区的界面态密度信息，导致无法准确测量。
AI.method: 从现有理论推导出一个静电约束条件，该条件仅由物理一致的氧化层电容满足，从而完善了高-低频技术框架。使用n-SiC MOS结构的模拟电容数据验证理论有效性，并展示频率限制。
AI.result: 理论分析证实了完善框架的有效性，能够确保在带边附近物理一致地提取界面态密度，克服了MOS电容表征中的基本限制。
AI.conclusion: 通过推导物理一致的氧化层电容约束条件，完善了高-低频技术框架，实现了MOS电容积累区界面态密度的可靠测量，解决了该领域长期存在的表征难题。

title: Probing Coordination Environments in Buried Oxides of Aluminum Josephson Junctions by Resonant X-ray Reflectivity
summary: Decoherence remains a critical obstacle to achieving high-fidelity, scalable superconducting qubits, with the tunnel barrier of Josephson junctions a key source of loss. Here we apply resonant X-ray reflectivity to non-destructively probe the electronic structure of buried layers in Al/AlO$_x$/Al Josephson junctions. At the Al $K$-edge, energy-dependent modulations in the reflectivity maps enable Kramers-Kronig-constrained extraction of the layer-resolved atomic scattering factors. The analysis reveals that the barrier coordination evolves from more tetrahedral toward predominantly octahedral character with increasing oxidation pressure. At the interfaces, the lower metal-oxide boundary is comparatively under-coordinated and disordered relative to the upper interface. Comparison with simulated X-ray absorption spectra identifies the dominant coordination motifs within the oxide and its interfaces, providing depth-resolved structural insight that constrains microscopic models of two-level system formation. These results link growth conditions, local coordination environments, and junction electronic properties, demonstrating resonant X-ray reflectivity as a powerful tool for probing the microscopic materials properties of Josephson junctions and providing a materials-level framework for mitigating decoherence in superconducting qubits.

AI.tldr: 利用共振X射线反射技术无损探测Al/AlOx/Al约瑟夫森结的电子结构，揭示氧化压力如何影响势垒层配位环境，为理解超导量子比特退相干机制提供材料层面的见解。
AI.motivation: 约瑟夫森结的隧道势垒是超导量子比特退相干的关键损耗源，需要无损探测其埋层电子结构以理解微观材料特性与退相干机制的关系。
AI.method: 采用共振X射线反射技术，在Al K-edge测量能量依赖的反射率图，通过Kramers-Kronig约束提取层分辨的原子散射因子，并与模拟X射线吸收光谱比较。
AI.result: 发现势垒层配位随氧化压力增加从四面体向八面体转变；下金属-氧化物界面比上界面更欠配位且无序；识别了氧化物及其界面的主要配位模式。
AI.conclusion: 共振X射线反射是探测约瑟夫森结微观材料特性的有力工具，建立了生长条件、局部配位环境和结电子性质之间的联系，为减轻超导量子比特退相干提供了材料层面的框架。

title: Designing a family of 2D kagome monolayer B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>8<sub>, B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>8<sub>H<sub>2<sub>, B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>6<sub>X<sub>2<sub> (X=Cl,Br,I) with tunable Dirac cones and high Fermi velocity
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) kagome materials have become a hot research topic in the current scientific community due to their unique electronic structural properties, and the design of novel 2D kagome materials represents a significant exploration direction in this field. In this study, by employing the "1+3" design strategy, surface passivation and charge balance strategies, we successfully designed a novel family of 2D kagome material B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>8<sub>, B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>8<sub>H<sub>2<sub> and B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>6<sub>X<sub>2<sub> (X = Cl, Br, I). Electronic structure analysis revealed that although B<sub>18<sub>S<sub>8<sub> exhibits excellent kagome band characteristics, its Dirac cone is located approximately 1 eV above the Fermi level, making it difficult to utilize. However, by surface hydrogen passivation, the Dirac cone can be effectively adjusted to the Fermi level. Further research found that introducing halogen atoms to replace surface sulfur atoms can similarly adjust the position of the Dirac cone to the Fermi level. The Fermi velocities near the Dirac cone for these five materials reach as high as 2.69 to 3.07*10^5 m/s. Additionally, spin-orbit coupling can open a bandgap of approximately 20 to 55 meV at the Dirac cone. Our research not only provides an outstanding example for the design of 2D boron-based kagome materials but also fully demonstrates the immense potential of such materials in the electronics field.

AI.tldr: 通过"1+3"设计策略和表面修饰，成功设计出新型二维kagome材料B₁₈S₈及其衍生物，实现了狄拉克锥在费米能级的调控，展现出优异的电子传输性能。
AI.motivation: 二维kagome材料因其独特的电子结构特性成为研究热点，设计新型二维kagome材料是该领域的重要探索方向，特别是硼基kagome材料的开发。
AI.method: 采用"1+3"设计策略，结合表面钝化和电荷平衡策略，设计了B₁₈S₈、B₁₈S₈H₂和B₁₈S₆X₂（X=Cl, Br, I）系列材料，通过电子结构分析研究其性质。
AI.result: B₁₈S₈具有优异的kagome能带特征但狄拉克锥位于费米能级以上1eV；通过氢钝化或卤素取代可将狄拉克锥有效调控至费米能级；狄拉克锥附近费米速度达2.69-3.07×10⁵ m/s；自旋轨道耦合可打开20-55 meV的带隙。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为二维硼基kagome材料设计提供了优秀范例，充分展示了此类材料在电子学领域的巨大应用潜力。

title: Pressure-induced lattice instabilities and phonon softening in the orthorhombically distorted ferrimagnet Ni4Nb2O9
summary: The ambient- and high-pressure behavior of the ferrimagnet Ni4Nb2O9 (orthorhombically distorted honeycomb structure), is investigated using NMR, Raman spectroscopy, and synchrotron XRD. Ambient-pressure NMR measurements reveal, despite its orthorhombic symmetry, the local environment of Ni4Nb2O9 closely resembles that of its trigonal analogue Mn4Nb2O9. In contrast, substantially different paramagnetic shifts observed in the two compounds reflect their distinct average crystal symmetries, governing orbital overlap and magnetic exchange pathways. Under external pressure, Ni4Nb2O9 exhibits pronounced sensitivity to lattice distortions and phonon instabilities. Three isostructural transitions are identified near 2, 6, and 10 GPa, manifested by mode splitting, frequency shifts, line broadenings, intensity anomalies, and slope changes in the evolution of lattice parameters. At higher pressure, around 13 GPa, signatures of an incipient long-range structural transition from orthorhombic Pbcn to monoclinic P2/c symmetry emerge, signaling the onset of a symmetry-lowering transformation. The anomalous softening of the 192 cm^-1 Raman mode, accompanied by multiple linewidth and spectral-weight anomalies, serve as a key fingerprint of these structural instabilities, linking local symmetry breaking at low pressures to the long-range transition into the P2/c phase. Notably, pronounced linewidth anomalies, strongly anisotropic pressure coefficients, together with a marked enhancement of the intensity of the low-frequency branch over the 2-13 GPa range, point toward a pressure-induced regime influenced by coupled spin, orbital, and lattice degrees of freedom. The close correspondence of transition pressures in Ni4Nb2O9 and those reported for Mn4Nb2O9 highlights a common mechanism rooted in their similar local structural environments, as revealed by NMR.

AI.tldr: 通过NMR、拉曼光谱和同步辐射XRD研究Ni4Nb2O9在常压和高压下的行为，发现其局部结构与Mn4Nb2O9相似，但在高压下表现出多个结构转变和自旋-轨道-晶格耦合效应。
AI.motivation: 研究Ni4Nb2O9这种亚铁磁体在不同压力下的结构演化，探索其局部对称性、磁交换路径以及压力诱导的结构转变机制，并与类似化合物Mn4Nb2O9进行比较。
AI.method: 采用核磁共振(NMR)、拉曼光谱和同步辐射X射线衍射(XRD)技术，在常压和高压条件下对Ni4Nb2O9进行系统表征，分析其结构、声子行为和磁性质变化。
AI.result: 常压下Ni4Nb2O9的局部环境与Mn4Nb2O9相似，但顺磁位移不同。高压下发现三个等结构转变(2、6、10 GPa)，以及13 GPa附近从正交Pbcn到单斜P2/c的长程结构转变迹象。拉曼模式异常软化和线宽异常表明存在自旋-轨道-晶格耦合效应。
AI.conclusion: Ni4Nb2O9对晶格畸变和声子不稳定性高度敏感，高压下经历多个结构转变。其与Mn4Nb2O9相似的转变压力表明共同机制源于相似的局部结构环境，揭示了自旋、轨道和晶格自由度之间的强耦合作用。

title: Percolation-driven $β$ -relaxation enables resonant acceleration of crystallization in amorphous phase-change materials
summary: Amorphous phase-change materials enable fast and reversible switching in optical and electronic devices, yet crystallization kinetics are still controlled primarily through empirical thermal protocols. Here we identify a microscopic picture governing crystallization in the prototypical phase-change material Ge2Sb2Te5, in which crystallization pathways are organized by the percolation of mobile atomic networks associated with $β$-relaxation. We show that this percolation transition distinguishes the dominance of diffusion-driven and diffusionless nucleation and growth during crystallization processes. We further demonstrate that frequency-selected ultrasonic excitation, applied in conjunction with heating, accelerates crystallization by enhancing percolation-mediated atomic dynamics. This acceleration is maximized near the $β$-relaxation frequency, consistent with resonant excitation of mobile atoms. Our results establish a direct link between glassy relaxation, atomic-scale percolation, and crystallization, and introduce a new route to modulating phase-change kinetics through targeted excitation of fundamental glassy dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了Ge2Sb2Te5相变材料中结晶过程的微观机制，发现β弛豫相关的移动原子网络渗流控制结晶路径，并通过频率选择性超声激发加速结晶过程。
AI.motivation: 虽然非晶相变材料在光学和电子器件中实现了快速可逆切换，但结晶动力学仍主要通过经验性热协议控制。需要从微观层面理解结晶机制，以实现更精确的相变控制。
AI.method: 研究识别了Ge2Sb2Te5中结晶的微观图像，发现结晶路径由与β弛豫相关的移动原子网络的渗流组织。通过频率选择性超声激发与加热结合，增强渗流介导的原子动力学来加速结晶。
AI.result: 渗流转变区分了结晶过程中扩散驱动和扩散不足的成核与生长主导机制。在β弛豫频率附近施加超声激发能最大化加速结晶，这与移动原子的共振激发一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了玻璃弛豫、原子尺度渗流和结晶之间的直接联系，为通过靶向激发基本玻璃动力学来调控相变动力学提供了新途径。

title: Time Resolved Study of Laser Induced Ultrafast Alloying Processes in Au/Pd Core Shell Nanorods
comment: The submission consists of a single PDF file containing both the main text and the Supporting Information. The main text includes 20 pages and 5 figures, while the Supporting Information comprises 21 pages and 10 figures
summary: Femtosecond laser-induced alloying presents a novel approach to modifying bimetallic systems. Visualizing ultrafast processes during laser-induced alloying is essential to uncover fundamental mechanisms associated with phase transformations, which enables precise control over material composition and structure at the atomic level. In this study, we investigated the ultrafast dynamics of laser-induced alloying of Au/Pd core-shell nanorods using a time-resolved X-ray diffraction technique at an X-ray free-electron laser facility, capturing the structural evolution from picoseconds to microsecond timescales. We found that a laser fluence threshold of ~ 48 mJ/cm2 with 800 nm excitation is sufficient for melting and subsequent alloy formation. Above this threshold, the formation of Au1.51Pd0.49 was observed, and we found that alloying is not a single-step phenomenon; instead, it is a dynamic process involving interdiffusion.

AI.tldr: 利用飞秒激光诱导Au/Pd核壳纳米棒合金化，通过时间分辨X射线衍射技术揭示了从皮秒到微秒时间尺度的结构演化过程
AI.motivation: 飞秒激光诱导合金化为双金属系统改性提供了新方法，可视化超快过程对于揭示相变相关的基本机制至关重要，这有助于在原子水平上精确控制材料组成和结构
AI.method: 在X射线自由电子激光装置上使用时间分辨X射线衍射技术，研究Au/Pd核壳纳米棒的激光诱导合金化超快动力学，捕获从皮秒到微秒时间尺度的结构演化
AI.result: 发现800nm激发下约48 mJ/cm²的激光能量密度阈值足以实现熔化和后续合金形成；超过该阈值时观察到Au1.51Pd0.49的形成，合金化不是单步现象，而是涉及相互扩散的动态过程
AI.conclusion: 激光诱导合金化是一个复杂的动态过程，涉及相互扩散机制，而非简单的单步相变，这为在原子尺度上精确控制双金属系统提供了重要见解

title: Elucidating different $NO_{2}$ sensing mechanisms in oxidized PbS nanocrystals
summary: In this work we provide an in-depth analysis of the sensing mechanisms of $NO_{2}$ by lead-sulfide nanocrystals (PbS-NCs). A detailed model for the sorption mechanism is proposed, and the correlation is established between experimental sensing characteristics and the surface composition, based on both experimental characterization and ab initio (DFT) simulations. We demonstrated how the sensitivity and the sensing dynamic response can be tuned by a post-deposition multistep dry-thermal process at mild temperature, that alternates vacuum-assisted annealing and heating in open-air. Sensors with different surface compositions were fabricated, and their dynamic response was characterized at low concentration of $NO_{2}$ (0.5 ppm) in air, at ambient temperature. DFT simulations indicate that both surface stoichiometry and oxidation critically govern $NO_{2}$ interaction on PbS, with sulfur-rich terminations favoring weaker binding and faster desorption, while intermediate oxidation enhances interaction and overoxidation leads to surface passivation, in agreement with the measured experimental sensing dynamics. By linking surface composition, adsorption chemistry, and resistance transduction within a single framework, this work provides clear indications to design room-temperature, low-ppm $NO_{2}$ microsensors fabricated through a simple and scalable processes.

AI.tldr: 该研究深入分析了硫化铅纳米晶对NO₂的传感机制，建立了表面组成与传感特性之间的关联，并通过后处理工艺调控传感性能，为室温低浓度NO₂微传感器设计提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 研究硫化铅纳米晶对NO₂的传感机制，建立表面组成与传感特性之间的关联，为设计高性能室温NO₂传感器提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用实验表征与DFT模拟相结合的方法，通过多步干热后处理工艺制备不同表面组成的传感器，在室温下测试对0.5 ppm NO₂的动态响应，并进行理论计算分析。
AI.result: 发现表面化学计量和氧化程度共同调控NO₂的相互作用：富硫表面结合较弱且解吸较快，适度氧化增强相互作用，过度氧化导致表面钝化，与实验观测的传感动力学一致。
AI.conclusion: 通过将表面组成、吸附化学和电阻转换机制整合到统一框架中，为通过简单可扩展工艺制备室温低浓度NO₂微传感器提供了明确的设计指导。

title: Probing Materials Knowledge in LLMs: From Latent Embeddings to Reliable Predictions
summary: Large language models are increasingly applied to materials science, yet fundamental questions remain about their reliability and knowledge encoding. Evaluating 25 LLMs across four materials science tasks -- over 200 base and fine-tuned configurations -- we find that output modality fundamentally determines model behavior. For symbolic tasks, fine-tuning converges to consistent, verifiable answers with reduced response entropy, while for numerical tasks, fine-tuning improves prediction accuracy but models remain inconsistent across repeated inference runs, limiting their reliability as quantitative predictors. For numerical regression, we find that better performance can be obtained by extracting embeddings directly from intermediate transformer layers than from model text output, revealing an ``LLM head bottleneck,'' though this effect is property- and dataset-dependent. Finally, we present a longitudinal study of GPT model performance in materials science, tracking four models over 18 months and observing 9--43\% performance variation that poses reproducibility challenges for scientific applications.

AI.tldr: LLMs在材料科学应用中，输出模态决定模型行为：符号任务微调后收敛一致，数值任务微调提升精度但仍有不一致性；数值回归中从中间层提取嵌入优于文本输出；GPT模型在18个月内性能变化9-43%，影响科学应用可复现性。
AI.motivation: 评估LLMs在材料科学中的可靠性和知识编码，解决模型输出不一致、可复现性差等关键问题，为科学应用提供指导。
AI.method: 评估25个LLMs在4个材料科学任务上的表现，包括200多个基础和微调配置；分析符号与数值任务的差异；比较从中间层提取嵌入与文本输出的效果；对GPT模型进行18个月的纵向跟踪研究。
AI.result: 1) 符号任务微调后收敛到一致可验证答案，响应熵降低；2) 数值任务微调提升预测精度但重复推理仍不一致；3) 数值回归中从中间层提取嵌入优于文本输出，存在"LLM头部瓶颈"；4) GPT模型18个月内性能变化9-43%。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在材料科学应用中，输出模态是决定模型行为的关键因素；数值任务的不一致性限制了其作为定量预测器的可靠性；模型性能的时间变化对科学应用的可复现性构成挑战。

title: Defect dependent dynamic nanoindentation hardness of copper up to 25 000 s-1
summary: Metals exhibit an upturn in strength at strain rates of approximately 1000 s-1 - 3000 s-1, governed by rapid dislocation multiplication, interactions and storage. This phenomenon is strongly influenced by the initial dislocation density before testing. However, the role of immobile dislocations arranged in low-angle grain boundaries (LAGBs) on deformation under such extreme conditions remains unexplored, despite their ubiquity in engineering materials. Here, we employ high strain rate nanoindentation targeted at an LAGB with tilt and twist components in copper crystals with different dislocation densities. We demonstrate that Taylor hardening remains valid over a wide range of strain rates. It was found that the influence of LAGBs on mechanical properties is within the scatter of the measurements. However, slip traces of indents close to the LAGB suggest that the LAGB acts as a barrier to dislocations. Molecular dynamics simulations further confirm these findings. The measured activation volume and low strain rate re-indentation onto indents performed at different higher strain rates give insights into the deformation mechanism. This work provides new insight into the interplay between microstructure and high strain rate deformation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高速纳米压痕实验和分子动力学模拟，探究了小角度晶界对铜晶体在极端高应变率下变形行为的影响，发现泰勒硬化机制在宽应变率范围内仍然有效，小角度晶界对力学性能影响有限但能阻碍位错运动。
AI.motivation: 金属在1000-3000 s⁻¹应变率下会出现强度上升现象，这主要受位错快速增殖、相互作用和存储控制。虽然初始位错密度对此现象有重要影响，但工程材料中普遍存在的小角度晶界在极端应变率下的作用尚未被探索，这是本研究的主要动机。
AI.method: 采用高速纳米压痕技术针对具有倾斜和扭转分量的小角度晶界进行实验，使用不同位错密度的铜晶体。通过分子动力学模拟验证实验结果，测量激活体积，并在不同高应变率压痕上进行低应变率再压痕实验以深入了解变形机制。
AI.result: 研究发现泰勒硬化机制在宽应变率范围内仍然有效。小角度晶界对力学性能的影响在测量误差范围内，但靠近晶界的压痕滑移迹表明晶界能阻碍位错运动。分子动力学模拟进一步证实了这些发现，激活体积测量和再压痕实验提供了变形机制的深入见解。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为微观结构与高应变率变形之间的相互作用提供了新见解，表明小角度晶界在极端应变率下主要作为位错障碍，但对整体力学性能影响有限，泰勒硬化机制在宽应变率范围内保持有效。

title: Pathway to lowest-energy structures for the surface triple junction verified by machine learning
summary: The behavior of surface triple junctions (STJ) at emergent grain boundaries on free surfaces are critical contributors to material properties, particularly at the nanoscale. Interest has been stimulated by recent experimental observations of local grain rotation, the restructuring of emergent grain boundaries and the resultant levels of stress generation, and computationally by the introduction of the core-shift method for building wedge disclination structures at STJ and the establishment of relationships between atomic calculation and the continuum elastic theory. Despite this progress, the lowest-energy structure for the surface triple junction is still unknown. Here, we carried out the experimental observation of the local surface deformation at STJ, the local stress analysis and ergodic searches for metastable structures. We identified the zipped Y-shaped notch, rather than the zipped V-shaped notch or wedge disclination, as the most stable structures, which was subsequently verified with machine learning methods for a wide range of boundaries. Local stress analysis explains this energetic preference. Our findings provide fundamental insight into STJ energetics and offer a possible framework for understanding kinetically diffusive deformation and the pathway for engineering related material properties, in particular thin-film properties.

AI.tldr: 研究发现表面三结处最稳定的结构是拉链状Y形缺口，而非V形缺口或楔形向错，这通过机器学习验证，局部应力分析解释了能量偏好。
AI.motivation: 表面三结对纳米尺度材料性能至关重要，但尽管已有实验观察和计算方法进展，其最低能量结构仍未知。需要确定最稳定的表面三结结构。
AI.method: 通过实验观察表面三结的局部表面变形，进行局部应力分析，进行遍历搜索寻找亚稳态结构，并用机器学习方法验证结果。
AI.result: 发现拉链状Y形缺口是最稳定的结构，而非拉链状V形缺口或楔形向错。局部应力分析解释了这种能量偏好，机器学习方法在广泛边界范围内验证了这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 研究为表面三结能量学提供了基础见解，为理解动力学扩散变形和工程相关材料性能（特别是薄膜性能）提供了可能的框架。

title: Enhancing Phase Clustering in Nanomechanical Property Maps of Multiphase Materials Using Kernel-Averaged Mechanical Mismatch
summary:
This work presents a novel approach to improve phase identification in nanomechanical property maps of multiphase materials, such as those obtained by nanoindentation or atomic force microscopy (AFM). A major challenge in validating clustering strategies for these data is the lack of ground-truth phase labels in experimental measurements, along with the tendency of overly simplistic synthetic datasets to artificially inflate algorithm performance. To address this gap, we construct controlled yet non-trivial synthetic benchmarks with tunable mechanical contrast, graded interfaces, curved boundaries, and diffuse morphologies, enabling rigorous and realistic evaluation of clustering robustness.
  Conventional clustering methods based only on elastic modulus (E) and hardness (H) often struggle to separate phases when mechanical contrast is low or when diffuse interphase regions are present. We introduce the Kernel-Averaged Mechanical Mismatch (KAMM), a neighborhood-informed feature that quantifies local mechanical heterogeneity by comparing each point to its neighbors in (E, H) space. When incorporated into a three-dimensional clustering space (E, H, KAMM), this framework improves phase separability, enhances interphase detection, and increases robustness to noise. By enabling more reliable segmentation of mechanical domains under realistic contrast conditions, the proposed method facilitates the generation of representative volume elements (RVEs) and supports more accurate extraction of phase-specific properties in heterogeneous microstructures.

AI.tldr: 提出KAMM（核平均机械失配）特征，结合弹性模量和硬度构建三维聚类空间，显著提升多相材料纳米力学性能图谱的相识别精度，特别是在低机械对比度和扩散界面区域。
AI.motivation: 当前多相材料纳米力学性能图谱（如纳米压痕或AFM数据）的相识别面临两大挑战：缺乏实验数据的真实相标签作为验证基准，以及过于简化的合成数据集会人为夸大算法性能。传统仅基于弹性模量和硬度的聚类方法在低机械对比度或存在扩散界面区域时效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建具有可调机械对比度、梯度界面、弯曲边界和扩散形态的受控但非平凡的合成基准数据集。提出KAMM（核平均机械失配）特征，该特征通过比较每个点与其在(E,H)空间中的邻域点来量化局部机械异质性。将KAMM与弹性模量和硬度结合形成三维聚类空间(E,H,KAMM)。
AI.result: KAMM特征显著提高了相分离性，增强了界面区域检测能力，并提升了对噪声的鲁棒性。该方法在低机械对比度和存在扩散界面区域的真实条件下实现了更可靠的机械域分割。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三维聚类框架(E,H,KAMM)通过引入局部机械异质性信息，显著改善了多相材料纳米力学性能图谱的相识别。该方法能够生成更具代表性的体积单元，并支持更准确地提取异质微结构中各相的特性参数。

title: Quasiparticle level alignment in anthracene-MoS2 heterostructures
summary: Heterostructures composed of transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) and organic molecules have been extensively explored for optoelectronic devices. To maximize their application potential, it is essential to investigate the electronic band structures, which govern the charge response of the interfaces to external perturbations. Based on $GW$ calculations, we present a study of organic-inorganic heterostructures with anthracene molecules adsorbed on monolayer MoS2. Building on previous investigations of organic molecule self-assembly at surfaces, we systematically analyze anthracene configurations with various molecular orientations and surface coverages. Partially self-consistent $GW_0$ provides qualitatively different level alignments from those in DFT. Whereas the systems with sparse, horizontally adsorbed anthracenes exhibit type-I alignment, densely packed anthracenes in the head-on position lead to type-II alignment, which indicates the strong dependence of quasiparticle corrections on the interfacial configuration. These findings highlight the importance of level-alignment predictions for both interpreting experiments and guiding the design of organic-inorganic heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 基于GW计算研究蒽分子吸附在MoS2单层上的有机-无机异质结构，发现分子取向和覆盖度显著影响能级排列，从稀疏水平吸附的I型排列变为密集头对头吸附的II型排列。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属二硫化物与有机分子异质结构在光电器件中有广泛应用潜力，需要研究其电子能带结构以理解界面电荷响应，为实验解释和器件设计提供指导。
AI.method: 采用GW计算方法，系统分析蒽分子在MoS2单层上的不同分子取向和表面覆盖度配置，使用部分自洽GW0方法并与DFT结果对比。
AI.result: 稀疏水平吸附的蒽分子系统呈现I型能级排列，而密集头对头吸附的蒽分子导致II型能级排列，准粒子修正强烈依赖于界面构型，GW0提供与DFT定性不同的能级排列结果。
AI.conclusion: 能级排列预测对于解释实验和指导有机-无机异质结构设计至关重要，界面构型对电子性质有显著影响，GW方法比DFT能更准确描述这些系统的电子结构。
